On day two, mischievous Derek pushes Matts buttons and ends up being banished from the kitchen. On the final evening, a cooking disaster sees Cat blowing her top, but Martin saves the day

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and his partner Marj restore a 163-year-old derelict chapel on Wales Llyn Peninsula, to turn it into a forever home with a working pottery studio. The pair start renovations on the downstairs Sunday School so it can become their living space, complete with a kitchen, bathroom, bedroom and a snug. But before they can begin they have to rip out the fungus and try to control the dry rot thats infected the chapel

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit Aberdeen to help two sets of house hunters who have relocated to the city for work and need to find family homes quickly. Helen Barr and Brian Clarence moved from Essex while awaiting the arrival of their first child and have been living in rented accommodation, but with baby number two on the way, its time to find a family home. However, Brians main priority seems to be finding a bargain, while Helen doesnt want to take on a project. Meanwhile, Kirstie helps Kirsten and Scott Laing search for a semi-rural property so they can move their family up from Fife

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca meets her high-school sweetheart and falls for him all over again - but he does not share her fantasies about getting married. Plus, the theft of Sams sports car results in him setting up a victims support group. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Bar Wars VI - This Time Its for Real
programme.desc: The traditional battle between the Old Towne Tavern and Cheers takes a new turn when the former comes under new management. The regulars feel they may have underestimated the opposition when they discover the nickname of the new owner - The Angel of Death. Harry Guardino guest stars alongside Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm tricks Cliff into thinking that material he has sent to Johnny Carsons The Tonight Show has been accepted - but the joke soon rebounds on the joker. Starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Ed Jackson, Billy Monger and Dame Sarah Storey present coverage of the opening events on day five of the Games in Italy. Great Britain take on China in the round robin stage of the mixed team wheelchair curling event at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium. Plus, para cross-country skiing takes place at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further live coverage of day five of the Games in Italy, including the conclusion of Great Britain v China in the round robin stage of the mixed team wheelchair curling event at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium. Plus, various para cross-country skiing 10k finals at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further live coverage of day five of the Games in Italy. The gold and bronze medal matches in the mixed doubles wheelchair curling get under way at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium. The 10km cross-country skiing events also continue at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further live coverage of day five of the Games in Italy, featuring the conclusion of the gold and bronze medal matches in the mixed doubles wheelchair curling at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium, as the inaugural champions in this discipline are crowned

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Power cuts strike Brian and Paulas new French restaurant, illness hits Jen and Nicks horse charity and delivery delays put back the launch of Jamess coffee bar in Spain

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.sub-title: Domes by the Sea, Dumfries and Galloway
programme.desc: Brothers John and Andrew throw open the doors of their glampsite, Domes by the Sea, on their family farm in Dumfries and Galloway. The domes seem to be an all-round success, and things get heated with a sauna experience and onsite hot tubs. But will limescale travails and self-check-in sorrow scupper the hosts chances?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third night in and around Manchester, dental nurse Amy hosts an American-themed dinner party - and shes counting on her grandmas secret rub recipe to bag the £1,000

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Highlights
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan presents action from day five of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. The mixed doubles wheelchair curling concluded with the bronze and gold medal matches at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium. A number of medals were also up for grabs at in para cross-country skiing at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Political Slot
programme.desc: Mothin Ali MP, deputy leader of the Green Party, sets out the partys plans for more investment in community projects

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help a pair of baptist ministers with their four-bedroom in Alnwick, Northumberland. Having grown up on the same street, Chris is ready for a change of scenery and a bigger, more user-friendly space for combining work and family needs - including fitting up to 14 people round a dining table. Caroline, however, loves their home, and particularly the neighbours who brought her, Chris and their teenagers comfort while she was undergoing cancer treatment

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Brenda Blethyn and Jessica Reynolds star in this drama based on the bestseller by Barbara Taylor Bradford, charting a womans rise from maid to businesswoman. In early 1900s Yorkshire, ambitious maid Emma Harte dreams of escaping Fairley Hall for a better life, but is caught up in a forbidden romance with Edwin Fairley, son of the master of the house. In 1970s New York, the worlds richest woman is warned that a plot is brewing to take away the empire she has worked so hard to build. With Ewan Horrocks, Will Mellor, Leanne Best and Lydia Leonard

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: Jodie and Zoe are called to break up a brawl between neighbours, but while one neighbour protests his innocence, the CCTV says otherwise. A child whos been found wandering the streets late at night doesnt want to tell veteran officer Emma who he is. Classically trained singing officer Joe contends with boozed-up Brightonians, including a woman whos reported to have downed a drink and got behind the wheel of a car

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: Leanne and Emily arrive at the scene of a car crash and race to catch a suspected dangerous driver who attempts to flee on foot. Ollie and Harry are called to investigate an altercation between housemates. In the centre of town, Petes coppers nose leads him to uncover something entirely unexpected

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: Members of the Coniston Mountain Team are summoned to help a paraglider who has crash-landed at the top of Great How Crag with potentially paralysing neck injuries. Meanwhile, a man has gone missing around the flooded tunnels of a disused quarry at Hodge Close

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen

programme.title: Catch Me Daddy (2014)
programme.desc: A girl runs away from her strict Pakistani family so that she can be with her British boyfriend - a move that enrages her father. He sends her violent brother and a group of other men to track his daughter down. Thriller, starring Sameena Jabeen Ahmed, Gary Lewis and Conor McCarron

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and Marj Hogarth set their sights on turning the old school room into their snug. Marj restores a baroque French chair, while fellow Pottery Throw Down judge Rich Miller helps Keith to make brutalist tiles for a feature wall. The couple take a break from forging the chapels future to visit the National Library of Wales to discover Capel Salems fiery past

programme.title: Jimmy Carrs Am I the A**hole?
programme.desc: GK Barry and Jamali Maddix pass judgement on a controversial psychic, someone who ended a friendship over ketchup, and some wild revenge against an ex

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman wants to be a professional NASCAR driver and pulls out all the stops to compete in the race of his life, with Butters as his pit boss

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Everything to the east of the Rockies becomes part of New Jersey, and as the state line approaches South Park, Randy and the boys prepare to stand against the onslaught. However, Kyles mother has a terrible secret to reveal

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Stan is given a glimpse of what life was like for Mr Mackey as a 4th grade pupil when the pair bond over their shared hoarding problems

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The Coon - Cartmans vigilante alter-ego - prepares to lead his team of heroes in finding a solution to the Gulf of Mexico oil spill, but another crime-fighter beats them to it, causing dissension to spread among the masked vigilantes ranks

programme.title: Jack Dee: So What?
programme.desc: A 2013 performance at Londons Hammersmith Apollo by the comedian, filmed during a tour which saw him return to stand-up after a hiatus of five years. Jack tackles lifes petty annoyances and everyday frustrations with his trademark mix of deadpan cynicism and understated fury, from visitors using his electricity to charge their mobile phones to his neighbours wind chimes and the problems of finding a decent electrician

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One Proposes
programme.desc: Joey tries to tell Rachel that he did not really propose, but cannot get a moment alone with her. Monica and Chandler continue trying for a baby - much to the horror of Mr Geller, who catches them in the caretakers cupboard

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler falls asleep in a meeting - with disastrous consequences. Meanwhile, Rachel desperately searches for a solution to baby Emmas non-stop crying and Ross breaks his finger trying to punch Joey

programme.desc: A chance to buy bargains galore

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.desc: Teleshopping feature bringing you the hottest destinations and latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys ask people for help with writing bizarre answers on a questionnaire, and then fall in love with total strangers in the park. The loser has to ruin an autograph session

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys pose as dental assistants doing and saying whatever the others tell them, and give campers some ridiculous campfire tips

programme.title: Impractical Jokers

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q host a festive edition of the show in front of a theatre audience, with holiday-themed games including a competition to decide who would make the best Santa

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is horrified to learn that his mother used to read the diary he kept as a teenager, which contained his most personal thoughts. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra are shocked to realise they have virtually nothing to talk about except the kids, and resolve to take more of an interest in each others hobbies

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is disturbed to learn Michael and Geoffrey are playing fairies in the school play, especially as they chose the roles themselves. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton, Sullivan Sweeten and Sawyer Sweeten

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Stefania, the woman Robert fell head over heels in love with during his holiday in Italy, turns up out of the blue with her father - but soon outstays her welcome. Comedy, guest starring Alex Meneses and David Proval

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray buys a new vacuum cleaner that is intended to make housework easier for the family, but instead causes friction between Marie and Debra

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie accuses Debra of not returning a cherished possession of great sentimental value, prompting a full-scale family argument over its whereabouts. Comedy, with Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Wedding - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As everyone makes their final preparations for Rosss wedding in London, Rachel tries to get a flight out to declare her love for him before he marries Emily. Guest starring Jennifer Saunders, Elliott Gould, Hugh Laurie and Tom Conti

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Ross Says Rachel
programme.desc: Despite Rosss massive blunder, he and Emily go through with the wedding - but she is clearly devastated and sneaks out of a window at the reception, declaring she never wants to see him again. Guest starring Helen Baxendale, Elliott Gould and Jennifer Saunders

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Kissing
programme.desc: Rachel returns from Greece and Chandler proves popular with the womenfolk. Phoebe feels upset about missing out on all the excitement in London, so the gang decides to treat her to a weekend in Atlantic City. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Surrogate mum Phoebe goes into labour and gives birth to triplets, but it proves harder than she anticipated to hand them over to her brother. Meanwhile, Joey experiences some pain of his own and Monica plans to spite Chandler by dating a male nurse

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Phoebe Hates PBS
programme.desc: Emily makes a request that could change Rosss life for ever, presenting him with a huge dilemma. Chandler upsets Monica by gloating about sex, while Joey challenges Phoebe to perform a completely selfless act. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross delivers devastating news to Rachel - he cannot spend time with her while Emily is in New York. Meanwhile, Joey discovers Chandlers secret romance. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Emily asks Ross to move away from his friends, while Monica and Rachel are understandably taken aback to meet a hairy man who they mistake for a yeti. American comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Moves In
programme.desc: Ross moves in with Chandler and Joey, but the transition does not go as smoothly as expected. Danny deals Rachels ego a blow by introducing her to an exceptionally dull date, and Phoebe becomes disillusioned with the health inspector she is seeing

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Thanksgivings
programme.desc: The pals digest a huge Thanksgiving meal and reminisce about their worst holiday experiences, including the time Chandlers father left his mother in favour of the houseboy, and the occasion in 1987 when a teenage Monica overheard Chandler calling her fat. Guest starring Morgan Fairchild

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey tries to cover up Chandler and Monicas relationship - but only succeeds in making himself look stupid. Phoebe persuades Rachel to take a literature class with her, while Ross falls out with his co-workers, convinced one of them stole his prized sandwich

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Inappropriate Sister
programme.desc: Ross struggles to come to terms with life as one of the unemployed, and turns to Joey for advice. Rachel is disturbed by her new boyfriends uncomfortably close relationship with his sister. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Resolutions
programme.desc: The pals announce resolutions for the coming year and Chandler enlists Joeys help so he can kiss Monica at midnight during a New Years Eve party. American comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Courtney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Chandlers Work Laugh
programme.desc: Monica is annoyed by the fake laugh Chandler uses at work whenever his boss cracks a joke and the gang gets a shock when Ross introduces his new girlfriend

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe meets her biological father for the first time and Rachel helps Joey look a little more sophisticated with the addition of a trendy shoulder bag - which everyone else mistakes for a womens handbag

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Everybody Finds Out
programme.desc: Chandler and Monicas relationship finally becomes public knowledge to all but Ross, who is starting to get his life back on track by renting a flat opposite the girls. Comedy, starring Courteney Cox and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Girl Who Hits Joey
programme.desc: Ross makes a bad impression on his new neighbours, and Monica piles the pressure on Chandler, demanding more commitment than he feels able to give. Joeys latest girlfriend proves a little too fiery - but he is afraid to end their relationship

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.desc: Another chance to see the 2012 contest, as presenters Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins invite 12 enthusiastic bakers to take part in a contest to determine which of them is Britains best amateur, facing challenges devised by judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood. programme.desc: The 11 remaining amateur bakers face three tasks designed to test their bread-making skills, beginning by preparing two varieties of flatbread for judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry. programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 10 remaining amateur cooks tart-making abilities are put to the test in the third round of the competition. Their first task is to bake a tarte Tatin, with judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry looking for intriguing flavour combinations to tickle their tastebuds. The hopefuls then face another daunting technical challenge as they try to replicate Marys seemingly straightforward recipe for treacle tart, but the delicate task of adding a lattice top leaves some contestants flummoxed. Finally, they try to create an ornate fruit tart fit for gracing the window display of a leading patisserie - before discovering the identities of the latest Star Baker and the person who will be heading home. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins. From 2012

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess the remaining contestants dessert-making skills. The hopefuls start by creating tortes before tackling this weeks technical test - the delicate French dish of creme caramel. Though these two rounds provide a stern examination of the amateurs creative flair and technical ability, they then face possibly the toughest task of the series so far - a six-hour challenge to create a show-stopping layered meringue. Once the sugar has set, who will be this weeks Star Baker, and who will be going home? Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins. From 2012

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Another chance to see the 2012 contest, as presenters Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins invite 12 enthusiastic bakers to take part in a contest to determine which of them is Britains best amateur, facing challenges devised by judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood. To begin with, they tackle an upside down cake, before following Pauls recipe for rum babas, a hybrid of cake and enriched dough that baffles some of the competitors. Finally, they are challenged to produce a show-stopping cake that reveals a hidden design when sliced into. Who will be first to leave?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 11 remaining amateur bakers face three tasks designed to test their bread-making skills, beginning by preparing two varieties of flatbread for judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry. The hopefuls then tackle a demanding technical challenge as they try to replicate Pauls recipe for an eight-strand plaited loaf, before receiving the dubious honour of becoming the first contestants in the shows history to make bagels. At the end of the day, Paul and Mary must decide who is this rounds Star Baker - and who will be going home. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins. From 2012

programme.desc: The chef learns that Salem is famous for its doughnuts, as well as its witches, as his culinary journey to discover the best buns and fabulous bakes in America concludes

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: Wilf and Arthur get in a flap with a rum-drinking parrot, and the big day arrives in Ormston - but the groom may not be all he seems. programme.title: Doctor Finlay
programme.desc: The medic temporarily hangs up his stethoscope to intervene in a confrontation between Irish farm labourers and irate locals who blame them for a typhus outbreak, resolving matters with a combination of tough talking and common sense. programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Jason playing piano in a bar to pay for his music scholarship, but his parents do not approve

programme.title: Ballykissangel
programme.desc: Father Aidan seemingly manages to heal a womans injuries - but is dismayed to learn she is still going through with a fraudulent compensation claim. Brian attempts to draw more tourists to the pub, Padraig digs up an old feud and Sean takes pity on an injured fox. Guest starring David Kelly

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: Tom attempts to help the father of one of his young patients see sense before its too late, and Arthur has some unconventional treatment for Eddie and Len when they turn up at the surgery with strange symptoms _ one has insomnia and itchy teeth, the other is suffering from Cosgrove Spine

programme.title: Doctor Finlay
programme.desc: Dr Napier is intrigued by an ex-colonial couple recently returned from India who settle in Tannochbrae and refuse to have contact with their mysterious daughter. Starring David Rintoul, Ian Bannen and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: Rumpole of the Bailey
programme.desc: Rumpole is tasked to defend a member of the Timson clan, an extended family of light-fingered but otherwise moral south London villains, and it appears the young man has been framed by an infamous gang. Courtroom drama, with Leo McKern

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Sick of eating liver and fish for the 11th straight day, Hawkeye hatches a plan to order 40 pounds of spare ribs from his favourite restaurant. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeyes letter home chronicles the details of life with the 4077th, including a gun-happy officer and the corpse of a Luxembourg soldier that mysteriously goes missing. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th seek out a dog that bit Radar to save him the agonies of a painful course of rabies injections, and Hawkeye defies Frank to treat a soldier suffering hysterical paralysis. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: Bob takes Terry on a tour of their old haunts - only to reveal most of them have been demolished. Terry finds it difficult accepting that times have changed during his time away - and a job interview proves the last straw. Classic comedy, with James Bolam and Rodney Bewes

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: Terry decides he would like to track down some of his former girlfriends - little suspecting the shocks that await him. James Bolam stars

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: Bob and Thelma throw a surprise party to cheer up Terry - but the blindfolded guest of honour begins to insult old friends, unaware they are listening to his every word

programme.title: The New Avengers
programme.desc: Steed investigates a cunning plot to replace prominent figures with down-and-outs kidnapped from a hostel for the poor and needy, and brainwashed into doing their evil masters bidding. Patrick Macnee, Joanna Lumley and Gareth Hunt star

programme.desc: Steed is placed under house arrest after being suspected of leaking secrets from the Carmadoc research institute, meaning Tara and her hapless new partner must unearth the real traitor alone

programme.title: Home to Roost

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Britains most advanced computer suffers a series of acts of sabotage. Steed and Tara try to decode a cryptic message from the machine naming the culprit. Dennis Price guest stars

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Harry Morgan guests as batty General Bartford Hamilton Steele, who mistakes Klinger for his wife, Marjorie. Morgan won an Emmy for his performance in this episode of the Korean War comedy, also starring Jamie Farr and Alan Alda

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank jeopardises delicate negotiations with the Chinese for the exchange of PoW patients by packing a gun - but the American-educated enemy doctor sees the funny side. Loudon Wainwright III guest stars

programme.desc: Frank bullies Hawkeye into standing in as officer of the day in Henrys absence. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda and Larry Linville

programme.desc: The community is terrorised when a group of white supremacists kill a boy and set fire to the local church. Adventure, starring Chuck Norris

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The gang joins a football team on a trip behind the Iron Curtain - to free an East German scientist. Action adventure, starring Robert Vaughn, Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent stows away on board an alien vessel, in the hope of learning how susceptible the invaders are to human diseases. Roy Thinnes stars

programme.title: End of the World (2018)
programme.desc: A family flees from a series of natural disasters caused by a solar storm, seeking relative safety in nearby caves. Disaster movie, starring Jhey Castles

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Triple Cross (1966)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War spy adventure about Eddie Chapman, a bank robber who became a British double agent in exchange for money and a full pardon. Following the German invasion of Jersey, Chapman offers to provide information to the Nazis, who are unaware his loyalties really lie with the British Secret Service. With Christopher Plummer, Trevor Howard, Yul Brynner, Romy Schneider and Claudine Auger

programme.title: Western World (2017)
programme.desc: Western, starring Greg Steele. A US Marshal is sent to Dogwood Pass to catch a ruthless killer, where a corrupt mayor and an unhinged sheriff stand in the way of justice

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk ignores an alien buoy warning the Enterprise that it is trespassing into hostile space, and ends up sentenced to death on a hostile planet where he is forced to take part in an OK Corral-style gunfight. Classic sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy and DeForest Kelley

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Part one of two. Vincent stumbles on a fiendish alien plot to destroy all the worlds leaders. Guest starring Michael Rennie

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The outbreak of a revolution interferes with the gangs plans to rescue three American agents from a Third World country. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker investigates a spate of robberies and encounters a friends husband in a halfway house for paroled convicts. Chuck Norris stars

programme.title: State of Play (2009)
programme.desc: A hard-nosed journalist investigating the murder of a congressmans intern discovers a connection between the tragedy and the death of a petty crook on the same evening. As he works to get to the bottom of the story, the reporter uncovers a political conspiracy that places him in a precarious and potentially life-threatening position. Thriller, starring Russell Crowe, Ben Affleck, Helen Mirren and Rachel McAdams

programme.title: Empire State (2013)
programme.desc: A security guard who failed in his ambition to become a cop is dragged into helping his friend with an armoured car robbery that proves to be the biggest in US history, leaving them in danger from the police and gangsters who do not take kindly to loose cannons on their turf. Crime thriller, starring Liam Hemsworth, Emma Roberts and Dwayne Johnson

programme.title: The Football Factory (2004)
programme.desc: Hard-drinking Tommy Johnson uses his love of football as an excuse for indulging in regular bouts of violence. However, the simmering conflict between fans of rival teams soon spirals out of control when Tommy is accused of raping the sister of a fellow hooligan. Drama based on John Kings novel, starring Danny Dyer, Frank Harper and Neil Maskell

programme.title: Horror Express (1972)
programme.desc: A fossilised alien comes to life on board the Trans-Siberian Express and wreaks murderous havoc among the helpless passengers. Horror, starring Peter Cushing, Christopher Lee and Telly Savalas

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker investigates a spate of robberies and encounters a friends husband in a halfway house for paroled convicts. Chuck Norris stars

programme.title: The Invaders

programme.title: Riddles of the Sphinx (2008)
programme.desc: When an astronomer and a cryptographer discover a series of ancient tunnels, they unwittingly release a deadly Sphinx intent on carnage. In order to recapture the creature in its tomb, the pair must decipher a series of intricate and deadly riddles. Monster thriller, starring Dina Meyer and Lochlyn Munro

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Arizona Bushwhackers (1968)
programme.desc: A Confederate prisoner of war is offered his freedom in return for becoming the sheriff of a lawless Union-controlled town. He plans to use the assignment as cover to smuggle weapons to the Southern forces, but ends up defending his territory from a corrupt saloon owner and the Apaches he has been arming. Western, starring Howard Keel and Yvonne De Carlo

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Dakota Incident (1956)
programme.desc: Mismatched travellers, including a bank robber, a politician and a dancing girl, are targeted by Cheyenne braves when their stagecoach is ambushed in the Dakota desert. When the coach is set on fire, they take cover in a gully, and a drawn-out conflict ensues. Western, starring Dale Robertson, Linda Darnell, John Lund and Ward Bond

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The Klingons and the Enterprise answer the same distress signal from space, and a malevolent being engenders paranoia and distrust between the crew and the aliens, leading to a violent battle. Starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy and DeForest Kelley

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Part two of two. Vincent enlists the help of an alien informant as he attempts to defuse an experimental rocket, which threatens the lives of the worlds leaders. Guest starring Michael Rennie

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: General Stockwell is kidnapped after the team steals a state-of-the-art Russian jet. George Peppard stars

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker takes the guise of a supply teacher to investigate the murder of a tutor in a school corrupted by violent gangs. Chuck Norris stars

programme.title: Mechanic: Resurrection (2016)
programme.desc: Hitman Arthur Bishops arch-enemy Crain kidnaps his new girlfriend Gina and blackmails him into committing three assassinations in as many days, while making them look like accidents. Action thriller sequel, starring Jason Statham, Jessica Alba, Sam Hazeldine and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: The Sentinel (2006)
programme.desc: A secret service agent is convinced a member of a neo-Nazi militant group has infiltrated the White House. But his attempt to investigate comes to a halt when he is framed for murder and blackmailed over his affair with the presidents wife. As he battles to clear his name, his former protege is given the task of bringing him to justice. Spy thriller, starring Michael Douglas, Kiefer Sutherland, Eva Longoria and Kim Basinger

programme.title: Lionheart (1991)
programme.desc: An ex-soldier supports the family of his murdered brother by winning underground street fights - but one fight proves tougher than the rest. Action, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme

programme.title: Aftermath (2017)
programme.desc: A hard-working construction worker is forced to deal with life-shattering loss when his family are killed in a plane crash. Drama, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Scoot McNairy and Maggie Grace

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old Josh is flown in with a possible penile fracture resulting from a canal barge accident, and while his parents make jokes to try to lighten the atmosphere, the injury could have serious repercussions for his future. A man with an injured finger following a night of clubbing contemplates his upcoming gender reassignment therapy, which will include taking hormones, while an 80-year-old with terminal cancer arrives after collapsing at her home

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman whose defibrillator located inside her chest has just delivered an electric shock to her heart and is worried that shes having a heart attack. A man falls on his driveway, resulting in a massive swelling over his eye, and a patient who has recently had bowel surgery is worried that he may have an infection

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A builder falls at work and dislocates his shoulder in such an unusual way it takes a five-strong team to pull it into place. Alan, who is in his sixties and had one leg amputated in 2009, comes in with the other dangerously swollen following a holiday in Goa, and 83-year-old James has to be persuaded by senior sister AnnMarie to accept treatment for a cyst on his knee

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old Josh is flown in with a possible penile fracture resulting from a canal barge accident, and while his parents make jokes to try to lighten the atmosphere, the injury could have serious repercussions for his future. A man with an injured finger following a night of clubbing contemplates his upcoming gender reassignment therapy, which will include taking hormones, while an 80-year-old with terminal cancer arrives after collapsing at her home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Europes biggest brewery - Heineken in the Netherlands - on a mission to explain the difference between lager and ale. His journey takes a surprising twist when he comes face to face with the mother of all lagers. Kate Quilton sets Matt Tebbutt the challenge of making crumpets, and finds out how they get filled with unique holes at the Warburtons factory in Enfield, north London. Matt also heads for snowy Canada to discover why maple syrup is so expensive, and finds out that maple syrup robberies are a big concern to the industry

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: The camping connoisseurs arrive at Cefn Coed, nestled within an ancient oak forest near the Mawddach Estuary, where highlights include forest bathing and a Thai cooking class

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit the Cotswolds and Somerset, where finds include a set of milk churns and an old munitions shell

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: In La Zenia, Alicante, Jean Johansson helps house-hunters Alan and Julie to find the perfect holiday home. Theyre looking for a three-bed villa or town house close to amenities for their budget of £140,000. Jean shows them five superb properties, but will any of them be the right place for Alan and Julie?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host in Edinburgh is property manager and law student Sharon, who has gone for a culinary nod to her Australasian travels, complete with a didgeridoo for good measure. The guests shes gunning to impress are taxi driver Andrew, management consultant Anthony, museum worker Carmen and geography teacher Ashley

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Management consultant Anthony provides an evening of fine food, the arrival of a new guest shocks the diners and Ashley gets rather competitive over a game of table-top croquet

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Library worker Carmen hosts the third evening in Edinburgh, serving up posh versions of her childhood favourites, so she asks her guests to come dressed as their 10-year-old selves. At the table, writer Gerald is less than impressed by management consultant Anthony and law student Sharons constant bickering, while teacher Ashleigh confronts Sharon over her old-fashioned views

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Edinburgh, American-born Gerald takes his guests Stateside with a menu of diner classics, but he soon finds himself on the back foot when finicky foodie Anthony gives his grub a grilling. Later theres Presidential name dropping, dubious doppelgangers and as the evening draws to a close, preening and pouting when the diners take part in a bizarre beauty pageant

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in Edinburgh, geography teacher Ashley hopes her magical evening of enchanted food will send her to the top of the leaderboard to secure the £1,000 prize. The soiree begins well with American Gerald, whose fear of mushed up peas is banished over the pea soup starter and even Anthony has his tastes changed when it comes to curried scallops. Fussy-eater Sharon, however has a few harsh words to share over her main of wild-caught trout, while museum worker Carmen enjoys a front row seat to the continued bickering between Anthony and Sharon

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to the Cliff House Hotel in Southbourne, where owner Rich Norris and chef Matt Head hope that their swish decor and top-notch breakfast will give them the edge. Guests Hannah and Ibrahim are blown away by their bathroom, but Paul and Dave end up feeling a little exposed. At dinner, a revelation about Ibrahims high-flying corporate career raises eyebrows, while the hosts culinary credentials raise eggs-pectations for the morning. At breakfast, Stuart and Fiona discover some fishy goings-on, before Hannahs verdict on the food leaves Rich and Matt feeling scrambled

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second venue of the week is the Hotel Barge Waternimf in Ely, Cambridgeshire, which has an open plan kitchen leaving the hosts exposed to everything the guests have to say

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Montpellier Hotel in Llandrindod Wells, Powys, where Hannah Henewaa and Ibrahim Sani hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Paul Wright and Dave McDermott welcome their rivals to the Coach and Horses in West Sussex, where one guest has a bad nights sleep and the fry-up falls flat for some of the others

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment Day sees the BandBers take each other to task on everything from insufficient slumber to hopeless hosting, before the payments are revealed and we find out whos won

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Eastbourne on a quest to secretly restore a 1962 Mini Cooper S. This particular model belongs to farmer Keith, who has raced and rallied cars for most of his life, until he was struck down with serious heart problems. Although his racing days are over, Keith cant let go of his beloved Mini Cooper, even though it has been rotting away in a shed for decades

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw revisit vehicles from the first four series to see how life has changed for the owners. Featuring an appearance by Roger Moore

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: The Prestia family must decide whether to take on a bonded pair of dogs and retired nuns Margaret and Antoinette hope to find their dog companion. Plus, can Justin the magician take on large puppy Oreos tricks?

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend restore a 2002 Suzuki Jimny. This cherished 4x4, filled with memories, was gifted to retired NHS nurse Joanna by her late father

programme.title: Saving Country Houses with Penelope Keith
programme.desc: In Northamptonshire, Nova Guest has decided to get to grips with Ashby Manors expansive parkland, and restore the views to the original vision of architect Edwin Lutyens. At Mapperton House, valuable tapestries are brought out for conservation. The staff at Chillingham Castle, Northumberland, explain the challenges of working for lifelong collector Sir Humphry Wakefield, who keeps buying new items and antiques

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 21-year-old woman on her first trip to London from Northern Ireland appears to be experiencing kidney failure, and medics fear she could be at risk of a cardiac arrest. A man in a critical condition after falling 20ft from a balcony is brought in by helicopter, and a 34-year-old who fell off her platform shoes while dancing is treated for a deep gash on her forehead

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Ninety-three-year-old Ernest is brought in with life-threatening injuries after being knocked down by a hit-and-run driver just outside the hospital. He goes into cardiac arrest, and a consultant must keep his heart going manually in a bid to save his life. Meanwhile, an 83-year-olds finger is mangled by a machine at his metal-working business, and a 51-year-old man with learning difficulties is treated after collapsing, prompting his elderly mother to wonder how he will eventually cope after her death

programme.title: Saving Country Houses with Penelope Keith
programme.desc: In Northamptonshire, Nova Guest has decided to get to grips with Ashby Manors expansive parkland, and restore the views to the original vision of architect Edwin Lutyens. At Mapperton House, valuable tapestries are brought out for conservation. The staff at Chillingham Castle, Northumberland, explain the challenges of working for lifelong collector Sir Humphry Wakefield, who keeps buying new items and antiques

programme.desc: Ninety-three-year-old Ernest is brought in with life-threatening injuries after being knocked down by a hit-and-run driver just outside the hospital. He goes into cardiac arrest, and a consultant must keep his heart going manually in a bid to save his life. Meanwhile, an 83-year-olds finger is mangled by a machine at his metal-working business, and a 51-year-old man with learning difficulties is treated after collapsing, prompting his elderly mother to wonder how he will eventually cope after her death

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of favourite investigations, including Jimmy Doherty visiting Spain to find out how much orange goes into squash. Matt Tebbutt tries to solve the age-old mystery of how to get ketchup out of the bottle smoothly, while Kate Quilton checks Marmites TV advert claims that a DNA test can predict whether people are more likely to love it or hate it

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: The campers visit Tyn-yr-Onnen farm on the edge of Snowdonia National Park, where hosts Len and Helen encourage them to embrace farm life, from feeding animals to picking mushrooms

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien find, fix and flog a huge range of possessions they unearth in Britains barns and garages, to make money for their owners. In this episode, they celebrate Henrys birthday with some serious finds in Wensleydale in Yorkshire

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Janine and Mark from Stockport, Greater Manchester, are hoping to find their perfect holiday home around the western Dordogne region in France. Married for 20 years and with two grown-up children, they feel now is the right time to buy their dream home in their favourite holiday spot. Laura Hamilton tries to deliver their dreams on their budget of £230,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Painter, decorator and security guard Michelle is the first host in south London. However, the heat really is on as she hits rocky waters with her first ever attempt at a vegan dish as part of her pineapple paradise menu. Events manager Rory is disappointed that some of the food is shop-bought, while Nesha, also an events manager, struggles to enjoy the warm pineapple. Not all hope is lost, though, as sales manager Mike loves it all - at least, thats what he tells Michelle

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The diners get dressed up as celebrities as sales manager Mike, in full Elvis gear, hosts the second evening in south London and serves up three courses of Caribbean cuisine

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: After two raucous evenings, hippy hairdresser Staar aims to chill her guests out with meditation, crystals and a menu of vegan dishes, hoping her earth mother vibes will put her in pole position

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The weeks dinner parties continue to be served in south London. After the chilled-out vibes of Staars dinner the previous evening, Nesha is keen to up the energy levels and deliver on the high standards of cooking she has been promoting all week. Confident, she goes all-out for her guests, but will it be enough to get her hands on the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the last night of the fun and games in south London and events manager Rorys turn to host with an Asian-themed menu and a glam-it-up dress code. Competitive sales manager Mike is sure hes in the top spot, but Rory knows his biggest threat is other events manager Nesha - who has been a constant critic over the week. Vegan hippy hairdresser Starr has suffered a rough ride with the food shes been served this week and tonights no exception when her dessert is a disaster

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week comes from Jockhedge Holiday Cottages in Burgh le Marsh, Lincolnshire, where owner Karen Cumberlidge and her son Liam hope to wow their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Victoria Inn in Witton-le-Wear, County Durham, where someone gets locked in a bathroom and bed springs leave one couple facing a battle

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit of the week, husband and wife Aidan and Mij Nattrass welcome their rivals to the Earlston House Hotel in Paignton, Devon

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Beach House in Portland, Dorset, where Pete Lacey feels his back-to-basics approach offers his guests good value. But things get heated with the radiator in Karen and Liams room and opinions are laid bare over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to find out how much theyve been paid and to settle some scores. Karen and Liam are shocked by their payment from Pete, while Carolynne and George want to find out what caused Karen and Liam to lose sleep at their place

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend take on Andys Ford Pop hot rod, a 1950s car thats jam-packed with modifications - all of which, sadly, are bent, broken or riddled with rust

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend fix up one of the most iconic cars to come out of Germany, a BMW E30 Alpina. Its Mazs pride and joy but his ill health has prevented him from getting it back on the road

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: The Bearsly-Young family try to fit in husky-cross Elly, Annika and Evie try to tame stressball Bunji and pocket rocket Raff leaps into Dave and Shelleys home

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Zimbabwean-born Davi and Matt from Australia, who are determined to create a home to reflect their backgrounds, so set out to build a house in the Chess Valley with a radical multicultural design, which is especially daring for their commuter-belt suburb. Despite their inexperience and the technical difficulty of the steeply sloping site, Davi and Matt manage the venture themselves. But its not long before the problems begin

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets college deputy principal Danny who plans on building a four-bedroom house in his garden in North Lincolnshire. He plans to build a stylish, sustainable but affordable home among the trees with dramatic bedroom pods raised on steel stilts on the edge of a fishing pond to help his three children connect to nature. With plenty of ambition but no experience as a self-builder, his £300,000 budget doesnt seem to match the scale of his project

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Consultant Emer Sutherland helps treat an eight-year-old who has fallen 8ft onto concrete while riding his BMX, losing his front teeth and possibly injuring his head and spine. A 19-year-old motorcyclist who hit a bollard requires urgent treatment on his leg, which may otherwise need to be amputated, and X-rays of a stabbing victim yield startling results

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A woman with a weak immune system owing to the radiotherapy she underwent for breast cancer is bitten by her cat, a minor injury that could cause her serious problems. A 71-year-old with terminal cancer is brought in with breathing difficulties and a decision must be made about whether to resuscitate her if her condition worsens. Meanwhile, a 12-year-old translates for his Brazilian grandmother and a five-year-old has her head wound stitched

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: The paramedics plan to take a woman who is in the advanced stages of labour to hospital, but when her waters suddenly break, they have to think again. A diabetic man has a painful urine infection, and a 14-month-old is choking and wont feed. A woman collapses at home and needs help getting up, but her daughter is more worried about her increasing confusion

programme.desc: Endangered animals become a symbol; of hope to a community torn apart by conflict in a National Geographic film directed by Tyler Schiffman. The Eastern Rift Valley in Africa is the ancestral home of the Rothchilds giraffe but these majestic creatures were wiped out in the region 70 years ago. Save Giraffes Now, The Ruko Conservancy, Northern Rangelands Trust and the Kenya Wildlife Service collaborate to rescue nine giraffes from a sinking island in Lake Baringo and relocate the animals to a 44,000 acre wildlife conservancy. Two tribes, who were previously at war, come together to save the giraffes and this inspirational story is captured in Schiffmans film

programme.title: The Invention of Surgery
programme.sub-title: The Secret of the Human Body
programme.desc: Exploring the history of surgery from its rudimentary conception centuries ago up to the modern specialist procedures that take place today. Beginning with a look at the risks people took to understand the human anatomy, how they managed to control human blood flow and how French king Louis XIV helped surgery become a recognised science. Part one of two

programme.title: Besieged Fortresses, Legendary Battles
programme.sub-title: The Siege of Orleans, Joan of Arcs Victory
programme.desc: The Siege of Orleans, the most striking event in the Hundred Year War. The city managed to resist for seven months from October 1428 to May 1429 before being delivered from the English in just a few days by Joan of Arc. It proved a turning point in the conflict between France and England

programme.title: Thirties in Colour: Countdown to War
programme.desc: Colourised footage of films from the 1930s, including thousands of people attending a homecoming parade in Hull to celebrate local hero Amy Johnson, who at just 26 years old had become the first British woman to fly solo from Britain to Australia. Plus, the Jarrow unemployment protest of 1936, led by MP Ellen Wilkinson

programme.title: Weathered: Earths Extremes
programme.desc: Maiya May explores heat in Portland, Oregon, and Medellín, Colombia, a city that is leading the revolution against sweltering city temperatures before visiting the hottest city in the US, Phoenix, Arizona

programme.title: The Bush Years: Family, Duty, Power
programme.desc: How George HW Bush rose to vice president under Ronald Reagan. His son George W Bush committed to a life of sobriety and helped propel his father to the presidency

programme.title: Thirties in Colour: Countdown to War
programme.desc: Colourised footage of films from the 1930s, including thousands of people attending a homecoming parade in Hull to celebrate local hero Amy Johnson, who at just 26 years old had become the first British woman to fly solo from Britain to Australia. Plus, the Jarrow unemployment protest of 1936, led by MP Ellen Wilkinson

programme.title: France: The Post War Recovery
programme.desc: Part one of two. The summer of 1944 marked the end of dark times for France. Aspiring to a better future, its people rolled up their sleeves and set out about rebuilding the nations industry and agriculture. However, in post Second World War France, hopes and reality soon collided

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Northern Ireland
programme.desc: The devastating impact of the conflict is explored through the stories of three women, as IRA prisoners begin their hunger strike in protest against Margaret Thatchers policies. Tit for tat killings, car bombs and assassinations became commonplace in Northern Ireland and fatigue from a population desperate for a respite from the cycle of violence creeps in

programme.sub-title: Phil Serrell and Catherine Southon - Day 5
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Phil Serrell travel from Great Baddow to Manningtree in a 1965 Mercedes 220 SE, seeking bargains on the Essex coast. programme.desc: Henry and stand-in searcher Guy are in Wiltshire visiting collectors Adam and Dan who have an assortment of trucks, tractors, and rare American cars

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus visits a home with a pub in it, filled with over 160 jugs. Later, he encounters a colossal collection of Glen Millar Vinyl and V-discs!

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus helps a woman fund her elderly mums care, and he clears a home for a couple who went through a life-changing, traumatic event on holiday

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Phil Serrell and Catherine Southon - Day 5
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Phil Serrell travel from Great Baddow to Manningtree in a 1965 Mercedes 220 SE, seeking bargains on the Essex coast. Phil hopes a restored contraption will generate a profit then travels back in time to the 1920s to learn about early radio. Hes amazed by the humble building where a maverick radio engineer became the worlds first DJ and pioneered the concept of light entertainment. Catherine picks up items as diverse as some Indian advertising memorabilia and a silver and rose-gold ticker. The final round in their best-of-five auction battles then beckons

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott take a ride around Suffolk and Norfolk, purchasing bargains including a damaged Stoneware Doulton flask and a 19th-century automaton

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus Ashworth takes a trip back in time when he visits a home that is dressed like a Victorian townhouse. Later, he helps a mother and daughter with an emotional task

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus Ashworth sells the treasures of an Abbey to fund the monks retirement, and a motoring fanatics cheeky sculpture sets pulses racing on sale day.

programme.title: Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus Ashworth raids TV presenter Susannah Constantines couture stash, then helps actress Leslie Ash uncover treasures, memories, and a few famous surprises!

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: A look at how footballs are crafted, how mussels are farmed, and how to design the ultimate fighter pilots helmet

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: The processes involved in using paraffin to make Gouda cheese, the building of powerful Scania trucks, and how the worlds biggest DNA database helps to solve crime

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: Exploring the creation of classical guitars and fast tractor mowing machines. Plus, how climbers maintain the blades on wind turbines

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers: Dream Car

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Bike guru Henry Cole and ace-mechanic Sam Lovegrove arrive in Cornwall, looking for something to buy, restore and sell on for a handsome profit. At a windswept hilltop farm they find cars, tractors and a very rare German scooter

programme.title: Shed and Buried

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help more people to reunite with long-lost relatives. Alice Jones was brought up by her father, but on a visit to her mother more than 50 years ago she met her younger brother called Sam and has always hoped that one day she would see him again. Mark Ratcliffe grew up in Lancashire and at the age of 12 his parents told him he was adopted and the revelation devastated him. Ever since, he cannot shake the question of how a mother could give up her child and is now looking for answers

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help more people to reunite with long-lost relatives. Martin Smith grew up in Rochdale and had a happy childhood, but struggled with intense feelings of rejection when he discovered he was adopted and only now feels ready to face his fears and find his birth mother. programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Comedian, presenter and actor Matt Lucas had an exceptionally close bond with his late grandmother, Margot, who came to the UK in 1939 as a Jewish refugee from Nazi Germany. Matt has never fully understood what Margot experienced as a young woman in Berlin in the lead up to the Second World War - or what became of the extended family she left behind. Matts poignant journey takes him to Berlin, and then to Amsterdam where he discovers an extraordinary connection to Anne Frank, as well as the fate of his many family members who had fled to Holland, which was later was invaded by the Germans

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?

programme.title: Drop the Dead Donkey
programme.desc: Helen makes a stand against the governments threats to Globelink, while Gus puts his foot down with a typically disgruntled Damien. Comedy, starring Stephen Tompkinson

programme.title: Drop the Dead Donkey
programme.desc: Sally tries to sue a tabloid newspaper over a defamatory remark, and goakeeper Pat Pringle joins the team as a sports reporter

programme.title: Fanny Hill (1964)
programme.desc: Bawdy historical romp based on the novel by John Cleland about a beautiful innocent making her way alone in the wicked world of 18th-century London.. With Leticia Roman, Miriam Hopkins, Alexander DArcy and Patricia Houston

programme.title: Mary Millingtons True Blue Confessions
programme.desc: A tribute to the actress. This unique documentary uses film from all aspects of her life, from intimate interviews to adult modelling.

programme.title: Stereo Underground
programme.desc: Richard Latto presents alternative anthems, gig stories and requests from a music community with attitude.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Beryl Cook
programme.desc: A look into the world of Beryl Cook, one of Britain?s most popular painters?an irreverent grandmother known for bold art featuring royal fantasies and cheeky scenes like a ?female flasher?.

programme.desc: Helen makes a stand against the governments threats to Globelink, while Gus puts his foot down with a typically disgruntled Damien. Comedy, starring Stephen Tompkinson

programme.title: The Dry
programme.desc: Emotions are running high on the day of the house auction - Bernie is distraught at Shivs impending departure, Ant is depressed and Tom is sick from nerves. As the auction gets under way, Ant begins to regret his involvement and comes up with a plan to thwart the sale. Meanwhile, Caroline struggles to cope with her pregnancy alone

programme.title: North Circular

programme.desc: Anne Cassin presents the first of two programmes to mark National Tree Week. The team also travels to Dublins Liberties to hear the story of a remarkable centuries?old pear tree that continues to thrive in the heart of the city

programme.title: Home of the Year
programme.desc: Hugh Wallace, Amanda Bone and Siobhán Lam visit three more shortlisted homes hoping for a shot at the title. In Kerry, they find a free-flowing, open plan house that mirrors the owners time travelling and working together, while in Dublin, they visit a renovation that created a blend of traditional and contemporary. Finally, in Cork they judge a detached new build that draws on natural materials, neutral colours and Scandinavian styling to create a bright and airy atmosphere

programme.desc: The latest national and international headlines

programme.title: Nationwide
programme.desc: Anne Cassin continues the celebration of National Tree Week with a look at an arts project dedicated to the precious and fragile environment of the forests overlooking Dublin city and what they mean to the many people who explore them every day. Also, reporter Zainab Boladale joins members of the Stepping Stone Forests project, a grassroots movement responsible for planting native woodlands across Dublin

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Priya is concerned for Ravis mental wellbeing, but Ravi heads to the gym to avoid her questioning. In the cafe, Ross tries to reassure Vicki of her safety, but their mood is soured when Mark arrives and chastises them both for getting involved. Peter supports Lauren as she prepares for her first day as manager of the car lot, but she is upset to learn that Max intends to run the business

programme.title: Eva Paus Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Eva shows how to impress without stress, creating black sesame yuzu tart, a striking dessert that balances nutty and citrus flavours beautifully. She then serves up hoisin ribs with slaw, paired with a crisp, tangy salad, followed by prawn and Thai basil yuk sung, a fun dish where dinner party guests can build their own flavour-packed parcels

programme.title: Nevens Ulster Food Tour
programme.desc: Neven Maguire starts his day at the Armagh Observatory and Planetarium with tours and outreach officer RokNe?i?, who takes the chef on a tour of the observatory. At the family-run Armagh Cider Company, Neven enjoys his first ever cider tasting with Philip Troughton - owner of the company. Also, Neven visits Scopers Restaurant in Dundrum, County Down, and chats about the food scene in the North with Chef Paul Cunningham

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: All That Remains with Niall Breslin
programme.desc: The rugby player-turned-academic and mental health advocate sets out on an emotional quest to remember more than 1,300 people buried in unmarked graves in the grounds of the former St Lomans psychiatric hospital in his native Mullingar. He uncovers stories of adults and children who were committed, died and buried under numbered metal crosses without names. Today, even those crosses have been removed. He explores the burial practices of patients unclaimed after death and investigates how many more institutional graveyards there are like this around the country - and what can be done to respect and protect them

programme.title: Goodman: Too Big to Fail
programme.desc: From sudden collapse to improbable comeback - the concluding part of the documentary reveals how Larry Goodman fought his way through financial ruin, political firestorms and public controversy to reclaim his empire and his seat at the head of the table

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Its July 1969 and everyone is giddy with nervous excitement about Apollo 11s imminent landing on the Moon. The whole community wishes to mark this special occasion, and there is a public showing of the landing outside, using the Nonnatus House television set. Trixie makes a mistake with far-reaching consequences while overseeing Joyces latest assignment, and Nancy delves into her familys past

programme.title: Irelands Fittest Family
programme.desc: The grand finale comes from the Tower and Treetop Walk of Avondale in County Wicklow. The remaining families battle it out in the hope of winning the 15,000 euros prize and claiming the title of Irelands Fittest Family 2025. Theyre suspended 20 meters above the forest floor on a see-through platform while holding a plank, pitted against each other in a shuttle race from hell, and much more

programme.title: Trackers: The People v The Banks
programme.desc: Going behind the headlines to tell the real story of the tracker mortgage scandal through the eyes of the customers most affected
