programme.title: Landscape Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Stephen Mangan presents highlights of the 11th series of the competition in which artists were challenged to capture the views at locations around the UK

programme.title: Arts Wildest Movement: Mannerism
programme.desc: Art historian Waldemar Januszczak explores the style of 16th-century European art in which the human imagination was allowed to run wild and be exciting

programme.title: Quant
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the life of fashion designer Mary Quant, with contributions from Kate Moss, Vivienne Westwood, Edward Enninful, Dave Davies, Charlotte Tilbury, Jasper Conran and Zandra Rhodes

programme.title: Spike Milligan: The Unseen Archive
programme.desc: A look at recently unearthed film, interviews and scripts from the comedy writer and performers archive, including an unpublished play called The Snow Goose

programme.title: Offended by Irvine Welsh
programme.desc: The novelist tries to find out why everyone is so easily offended these days, discussing the risk of upsetting people in the current climate with fellow artists and writers

programme.title: Wills Book
programme.desc: The story of how 400 years ago two actor friends of William Shakespeare took on the task of saving his work for posterity in one book, which became known as the First Folio

programme.title: Sky Arts Book Club
programme.desc: Andi Oliver and Elizabeth Day are joined by authors Natasha Brown and Marian Keyes, who discuss their books with Angie Greaves Book Club. Plus, special guest Bernardine Evaristo

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Following his lover Brandons murder, Omar is determined to help the police bring Barksdale to justice and agrees to testify in the Gant trial. Meanwhile, Major Rawls puts pressure on Bunk to make arrests in the three unsolved cases he is investigating, forcing McNulty, Greggs and Freamon to ask Daniels for more time and preserve the wiretap on the Barksdale crew

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Sookie struggles with her emotions when the serial killer strikes close to home. Jason finds the urge for vampire blood hard to bear, eventually lashing out at his sister in his lowest moment. Elsewhere, Sam and Tara find comfort in each others loneliness. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin, Stephen Moyer and Ryan Kwanten

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion is sent out to welcome a royal party from Dorne outside the walls of Kings Landing, and Jon Snow finds himself on trial at Castle Black over his time with the wildlings and the death of Qhorin Halfhand. Daenerys heads toward the slave city of Meereen, and Arya runs into a familiar face. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, the day of King Joffreys wedding to Margaery Tyrell arrives, and while the sadistic monarch delights in tormenting his uncle Tyrion, the capitals various factions plot further alliances. However, all attention is drawn back to Joffrey following the arrival of a pie filled with live birds. Meanwhile, Melisandre oversees a sacrifice to the Lord of Light at Dragonstone as three traitors are burned at the stake, and the future continues to look grim for Theon as Ramsay Snow finds a use for him. North of the Wall, Bran sees clearly where he and his friends must go after experiencing a series of visions

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Ser Dontos spirits Sansa out of Kings Landing and rows her out to a waiting ship, and Pod gives Tyrion news of his forthcoming trial. Tywin counsels Tommen on what makes a good king and also has an offer for Oberyn Martell. Sam decides Castle Black is not a safe places for Gilly, while Jon proposes a bold plan after the wildlings send a chilling message. Across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys picks a champion to take on the best that Meereen has to offer and Davos has an idea about raising funds for Stanniss cause

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: April returns to Pauls office, where she reveals her chemotherapy seems to be working - but this good news has left her questioning her own identity. She announces that she wants to stop her sessions with Paul and sever all ties with her old life, so the therapist tries to assure her that her future could be brighter than she thinks. Drama, starring Gabriel Byrne and Alison Pill

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard, the owners of Carlton Towers near Selby in North Yorkshire, prepare to host a fitness boot camp weekend at their property - while also welcoming an array of guests to celebrate their sons birthday. Meanwhile, Sir Benjamin Slade hopes a murder mystery weekend at Maunsel House in Somerset will help pay off a sizeable electricity bill

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. Among his destinations are a 1930s banking building that has remained unaltered since closing in 2007, a well-appointed set of toilets and a recording studio hidden in a bar. He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: AJ is called into the principals office with his parents when he turns up drunk at the gym, having stolen the church sacramental wine. Tony turns to Dr Melfi for assurance that his son is not doomed, and reminisces about his own childhood. Drama, starring James Gandolfini and Lorraine Bracco

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Rumours of an FBI clampdown on the New York underworld prompt Tony and his associates to do a little house-cleaning - and his mother Livia unwittingly ends up with all manner of cash, guns and stolen jewellery hidden in her room at Green Groves

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the attack on Pearl Harbour, US marine sergeant John Basilone prepares to confront Japanese forces somewhere in the Pacific. Meanwhile, Robert Leckie has his first taste of combat on Guadalcanal, while privileged Eugene Sledge longs to join the war. Fact-based Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale, Joseph Mazzello and Jon Seda

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sgt Basilone arrives in Guadalcanal, and quickly earns the respect of his comrades for his leadership and valour in a series of skirmishes. However, a naval bombardment leads to several casualties - and when it is followed by a major assault on the airfield, Basilone and his men are pushed to the limits of their endurance as they try to defend their territory. Second World War drama, starring Jon Seda

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The American soldiers arrive in Melbourne following their ordeal at Guadalcanal, and are greeted as heroes by the Australian public. Leckie falls for a local woman, and Basilone is honoured for his bravery in battle - but discovers that his new-found fame back home has an unexpected downside. Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale and Jon Seda

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Leckie and his comrades arrive on the island of New Britain, where they try to repel a concerted Japanese attack - but adjusting to the jungle terrain and battling illness prove to be their greatest challenges. After clashing with his commanding officer, Leckie witnesses a horrifying sight, and soon finds himself struggling to retain his sanity. Second World War drama, based on the memoirs of US marines, starring James Badge Dale

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sledge leaves America to join the forces in the South Pacific - and has a harrowing introduction to combat when he participates in the assault on Peleliu. Back home, Basilone tours America to promote the war bonds programme. Second World War drama, based on the memoirs of US marines, starring Joseph Mazzello and Jon Seda

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The marines have to deal with dehydration and nerves as they prepare to launch an attack on Peleliu airfield. A risky manoeuvre places the entire company in danger, and Sledge realises that he is still far from accustomed to the brutal realities of war - while Leckie is forced to risk his life to retrieve vital supplies. Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale and Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The ongoing conflict on Peleliu takes its toll on Sledge as the Japanese soldiers dig into their positions, forcing the Americans to pick them off one by one, and he nearly succumbs to joining his comrades in their hunt for macabre trophies. Back in the US, Basilone becomes disillusioned with his role selling war bonds and longs to rejoin his comrades in the Pacific. War drama, starring Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: A restless Basilone is assigned to train new recruits after urging the army to give him a more active role, but finds himself becoming surprisingly close to a female sergeant at his new base. However, the pair are driven apart when he is called on to lead his trainees into battle on Iwo Jima. Second World War drama, based on the memoirs of US Marines who served in the conflict, starring Jon Seda and Annie Parisse

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sledges division is sent to assist the attack on a fortified position in Okinawa. As they struggle through the muddy landscape, they encounter horrific evidence of the conflicts impact on Japanese civilians, and struggle to reconcile their duties with the suffering of the regions people. Second World War drama, starring Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The Marines return home following the Japanese surrender, but a demoralised Sledge struggles to cope with the horrors he saw during the campaign. Leckies relationship with his parents deteriorates, and Lena meets Basilones family for the first time. Conclusion of the Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale and Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Jaime finally visits Tyrion in jail after some persuasion from Bronn, and he also has a mission for Brienne. Daenerys tries to balance justice and mercy in Meereen. At Castle Black, Jon asks for volunteers when Ser Alliser decides to let him go to Crasters Keep to deal with the mutineers. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Kit Harrington

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Valery Legasov draws up a plan, but it comes with great risks. Meanwhile, Lyudmilla ignores warnings about her firefighter husbands contamination

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Valery Legasov and Boris Shcherbina come up with a life-saving idea to remove radioactive debris. Elsewhere, Ulana faces problems as she investigates the explosion

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue pursues a new business venture as she helps forge a friendship between Jules and Elliot. Maddy considers getting back together with Nate

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.sub-title: You Who Cannot See, Think of Those Who Can
programme.desc: After bailing on his weekly hook-up with Cassie, Nate and Maddy finally speak face to face. Jules and Elliot spend more time together

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue continues her downward spiral, and tensions with her family escalate when her recent behaviour is brought to light. Starring Zendaya and Hunter Schafer

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Tipped off by the wire, Greggs, Herc, Carver and Freamon intercept a drugs resupply in Franklin Terrace. Their success makes Avon and Stringer suspicious, leading them to rip out the payphones and close shop in the Pit. Bunk and McNulty trace another eyewitness to the Gant murder and ask Omar for help in tracking down their suspect

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Jaime finally visits Tyrion in jail after some persuasion from Bronn, and he also has a mission for Brienne. Daenerys tries to balance justice and mercy in Meereen. At Castle Black, Jon asks for volunteers when Ser Alliser decides to let him go to Crasters Keep to deal with the mutineers. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Kit Harrington

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Everyday life at Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, where the members of staff try to tactfully deal with the whims of their employer, baronet Humphry Wakefield, as the estate prepares to welcome a band of ghost-hunting tourists. Meanwhile, Carlton Towers in East Yorkshire hosts an annual dog show for Afghan hounds

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming discovers more little-known facts on a journey between Smithfields and Spitalfields, two of Londons most famous markets. He begins with a fry-up breakfast before visiting the remains of a Roman amphitheatre and investigating a mysterious secret in a Liverpool Street hotel, as well as meeting former EastEnders star Larry Lamb (Archie Mitchell)

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores Newcastle, discovering strange sounds by the river and finding out how traditional culture is being reinterpreted in the Byker district. He goes behind the scenes at Newcastle United with local football hero Peter Beardsley, learns about the history of adult comic Viz from former editor Simon Donald and accompanies comedienne Sarah Millican to her favourite part of the city

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony is pleased to find Carmela has heard intimate details of Juniors love life and quickly realises he could use them to his advantage, leading to a not-so-friendly game of golf between nephew and uncle. Meanwhile, one of Meadows classmates attempts suicide, resulting in a startling revelation about the schools soccer coach

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tonys henchmen kill a Colombian drug dealer doing business on their patch, resulting in a tidy profit for the Soprano crew. Christopher takes girlfriend Adriana to New York for dinner, where they meet gangsta rapper Massive Genius, who is interested in a rendezvous with Tonys friend Hesh. Drama, starring James Gandolfini

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Kendall and the Waystar team find themselves working together at the annual shareholders meeting, where Logans health takes a turn. Starring Brian Cox and Jeremy Strong

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Logan and team head to Virginia for a conservative political conference, where Roman finds out surprising news about his mother

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: At Kendalls lavish birthday bash, Shiv and Roman try to arrange a meeting with Lukas Matsson, a tech mogul who recently snubbed Logan

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode, the Roy family come together to attend a wedding in Italy, and Kendall confronts his father and demands to speak with him

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Shiv, Kendall and Roman join forces to confront their father, and pushed to the brink, Tom makes a life-changing decision. Brian Cox, Jeremy Strong and Sarah Snook star

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: As Kendall, Shiv and Roman hone their pitch for investors in Los Angeles, Logan learns of a rival bid. Drama, starring Brian Cox and Jeremy Strong

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: While Kendall, Shiv and Roman consider an aggressive move regarding the Matsson deal, Connor tries to make the most of his wedding rehearsal dinner

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: While Logan doles out an unsavoury task to Roman ahead of his trip to meet Matsson, Connor fixates on small details at his wedding.

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Cersei and Tywin plot the next move for the Lannisters and the Crown after Tommens coronation, while Ser Jorah gives Daenerys worrying news about the situations in Yunkai and Astapor. Jon and his band of volunteers mount a raid on the mutineers at Crasters Keep, and Sansa and Littlefinger arrive at the Eyrie. Fantasy drama, starring Lena Headey, Charles Dance, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The Laws of Gods and Men
programme.desc: Stannis and Davos arrive in Braavos for their meeting with the Iron Bank, but find Tycho Nestoris (Mark Gatiss) a hard man to do business with. Yara Greyjoy leads a band of Ironborn on a mission to rescue her brother Theon, while Daenerys meets with supplicants in Meereen. In Kings Landing, Tyrions trial begins in the throne room and he is stunned by the identity of one of the crowns witnesses. Fantasy drama, starring Stephen Dillane and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Drama following the exploits of various guests and employees at the tropical White Lotus resort over the course of a week. In the opening episode, tensions quickly arise between the hotel staff and the volatile vacationers that have recently arrived at the resort. Rachel approaches Nicole for advice, Paula and Olivia lose track of their stash, while a revived Mark attempts to connect with Quinn. Starring Murray Bartlett and Connie Britton

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Belinda walks a fine line with Tanya, Armond deals with his guilt and Rachel seeks advice from Nicole. Elsewhere, Mark reconnects with Quinn

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Herc and Carver arrest a driver after witnessing him picking up a large amount of cash from known gang members, but are forced to return the money when the mans political connections to a senator are revealed. After his apartment is raided and van torched, Omar takes revenge in a street encounter with Wee-Bey and Stinkum

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: An upset Bill is spurred into action by Sookies revelation concerning the abuse she suffered as a child. Jason travels to Fangtasia searching for V, Tara reluctantly agrees to pay for an exorcism for her mother, and three vampires turn up at Merlottes to convince Bill to join their group. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin and Stephen Moyer

programme.desc: Shiv, Kendall and Roman join forces to confront their father, and pushed to the brink, Tom makes a life-changing decision. Brian Cox, Jeremy Strong and Sarah Snook star

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: As Kendall, Shiv and Roman hone their pitch for investors in Los Angeles, Logan learns of a rival bid. Drama, starring Brian Cox and Jeremy Strong

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: While Kendall, Shiv and Roman consider an aggressive move regarding the Matsson deal, Connor tries to make the most of his wedding rehearsal dinner

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: While Logan doles out an unsavoury task to Roman ahead of his trip to meet Matsson, Connor fixates on small details at his wedding.

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Cersei and Tywin plot the next move for the Lannisters and the Crown after Tommens coronation, while Ser Jorah gives Daenerys worrying news about the situations in Yunkai and Astapor. Jon and his band of volunteers mount a raid on the mutineers at Crasters Keep, and Sansa and Littlefinger arrive at the Eyrie. Fantasy drama, starring Lena Headey, Charles Dance, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The Laws of Gods and Men
programme.desc: Stannis and Davos arrive in Braavos for their meeting with the Iron Bank, but find Tycho Nestoris (Mark Gatiss) a hard man to do business with. Yara Greyjoy leads a band of Ironborn on a mission to rescue her brother Theon, while Daenerys meets with supplicants in Meereen. In Kings Landing, Tyrions trial begins in the throne room and he is stunned by the identity of one of the crowns witnesses. Fantasy drama, starring Stephen Dillane and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Drama following the exploits of various guests and employees at the tropical White Lotus resort over the course of a week. In the opening episode, tensions quickly arise between the hotel staff and the volatile vacationers that have recently arrived at the resort. Rachel approaches Nicole for advice, Paula and Olivia lose track of their stash, while a revived Mark attempts to connect with Quinn. Starring Murray Bartlett and Connie Britton

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Belinda walks a fine line with Tanya, Armond deals with his guilt and Rachel seeks advice from Nicole. Elsewhere, Mark reconnects with Quinn

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Herc and Carver arrest a driver after witnessing him picking up a large amount of cash from known gang members, but are forced to return the money when the mans political connections to a senator are revealed. After his apartment is raided and van torched, Omar takes revenge in a street encounter with Wee-Bey and Stinkum

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: An upset Bill is spurred into action by Sookies revelation concerning the abuse she suffered as a child. Jason travels to Fangtasia searching for V, Tara reluctantly agrees to pay for an exorcism for her mother, and three vampires turn up at Merlottes to convince Bill to join their group. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin and Stephen Moyer

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Cersei and Tywin plot the next move for the Lannisters and the Crown after Tommens coronation, while Ser Jorah gives Daenerys worrying news about the situations in Yunkai and Astapor. Jon and his band of volunteers mount a raid on the mutineers at Crasters Keep, and Sansa and Littlefinger arrive at the Eyrie. Fantasy drama, starring Lena Headey, Charles Dance, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The Laws of Gods and Men
programme.desc: Stannis and Davos arrive in Braavos for their meeting with the Iron Bank, but find Tycho Nestoris (Mark Gatiss) a hard man to do business with. Yara Greyjoy leads a band of Ironborn on a mission to rescue her brother Theon, while Daenerys meets with supplicants in Meereen. In Kings Landing, Tyrions trial begins in the throne room and he is stunned by the identity of one of the crowns witnesses. Fantasy drama, starring Stephen Dillane and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion enlists an unlikely ally, while Daario entreats Daenerys to allow him to do what he does best. Jons warnings about the Walls vulnerability fall on deaf ears, while Brienne and Pod follow a new lead as they continues their mission to track down the Stark girls. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Kit Harington and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Blade Runner (1982)
programme.desc: A former cop in a bleak future Los Angeles is forced to return to duty for a mission to hunt down and kill a group of renegade android replicants. The fugitives have escaped from a space colony to find their creator on Earth, in a bid to prolong their limited lifespan. Theatrical cut of Ridley Scotts sci-fi thriller, originally released in cinemas, starring Harrison Ford, Rutger Hauer, Sean Young and Daryl Hannah

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon (1975)
programme.desc: Hapless Sonny and his sidekick Sal have a plan to rob a Brooklyn bank. The novice crooks thought they would be in and out in 10 minutes, but instead find themselves stuck in an ongoing hostage situation, with the police and the media laying siege to the bank. Sidney Lumets fact-based drama, starring Al Pacino, John Cazale and Charles Durning.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky (2001)
programme.desc: The laid-back lifestyle of an arrogant New York playboy is shattered when his unstable girlfriend drives off a bridge with him in the car. Although he survives, he struggles to put his life back together in the face of a series of strange events. Cameron Crowes remake of Spanish thriller Open Your Eyes, starring Tom Cruise, Cameron Diaz, Kurt Russell, Jason Lee and Penelope Cruz, who also appeared in the original

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal (1973)
programme.desc: A group of conspirators contracts the Jackal, a professional hitman, to assassinate President Charles de Gaulle of France. The killer starts to put his painstaking plans into action, creating a new identity, establishing his alibi and commissioning a custom-made weapon, while out-foxing the French police at every turn. Fred Zinnemanns adaptation of Fredericks Forsyth thriller, with Edward Fox, Michael Lonsdale, Alan Badel, Tony Britton and Cyril Cusack

programme.title: Ghostbusters (1984)
programme.desc: Three eccentric scientists put their hi-tech gadgetry and knowledge of the paranormal to money-making use by setting up in business as freelance ghost catchers. A musician calls them in to investigate when she sees strange creatures in her kitchen, only to end up possessed. As the spook-hunting team members deal with an attempt to shut their operation down, they discover an evil demonic entity is being summoned into existence and it falls to them to stop this creature from destroying the world. Supernatural comedy adventure, starring Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Sigourney Weaver, Ernie Hudson and Rick Moranis

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mothers heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes (2009)
programme.desc: The eccentric detective and his confidant Dr Watson investigate the apparent resurrection of a criminal mastermind with links to the occult, who is carrying out a series of seemingly magical murders. The case is complicated by the reappearance of Holmes duplicitous old flame Irene Adler. Action thriller, starring Robert Downey Jr, Jude Law, Rachel McAdams, Mark Strong and Eddie Marsan

programme.title: Vanilla Sky (2001)
programme.desc: The laid-back lifestyle of an arrogant New York playboy is shattered when his unstable girlfriend drives off a bridge with him in the car. Although he survives, he struggles to put his life back together in the face of a series of strange events. Cameron Crowes remake of Spanish thriller Open Your Eyes, starring Tom Cruise, Cameron Diaz, Kurt Russell, Jason Lee and Penelope Cruz, who also appeared in the original

programme.title: Oceans Eleven (2001)
programme.desc: A suave ex-convict assembles a gang of sophisticated crooks to pull off a daring heist. He intends to rob three of Las Vegass biggest casinos simultaneously - and also win back his estranged wife, who is now dating the ruthless owner of all three gambling establishments. Steven Soderberghs crime comedy, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Matt Damon and Bernie Mac

programme.title: Nosferatu (2024)
programme.desc: In 1838 Germany, Thomas Hutter is sent to the Carpathian mountains to secure the signature of enigmatic nobleman Count Orlok on a property sale in the German city of Wisborg. Thomas leaves his bride Ellen in the care of friend Friedrich Harding and his wife Anna. The young man barely survives the exhausting trip to Europe and stumbles home to find Ellen driven to delirium by a telepathic bond to the Count. Director Robert Eggers version of the Dracula-inspired horror, starring Bill Skarsgard, Lily-Rose Depp, Nicholas Hoult and Aaron Taylor-Johnson

programme.title: Get Out (2017)
programme.desc: After African American photographer Chris and his white girlfriend Rose visit her wealthy parents, he suspects theres more to the locals than meets the eye. Oscar-winning psychological thriller written and directed by Jordan Peele (Us), starring Daniel Kaluuya, Allison Williams, Bradley Whitford and Caleb Landry Jones

programme.title: The Perfect Storm (2000)
programme.desc: The skipper of a fishing boat and his crew ignore severe weather warnings and head for a dangerous area of the North Atlantic in search of the last lucrative catch of the season, but end up fighting for survival in the worst storm of the 20th century. Fact-based disaster drama, with George Clooney, Mark Wahlberg, Diane Lane, John C Reilly and Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall (1994)
programme.desc: A retired army colonel has raised his three sons alone on their remote Montana ranch. But the all-male household is thrown into turmoil when the youngest son brings home his beautiful fiancee, causing jealousy and tensions that culminate in tragedy. Edward Zwicks period drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Brad Pitt, Aidan Quinn, Julia Ormond and Henry Thomas

programme.title: Mollys Game (2017)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about Molly Bloom, an Olympic-class skier who ran the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally - unbeknownst to her - the Russian Mob. Directed by The West Wing creator Aaron Sorkin, and starring Jessica Chastain, Idris Elba and Kevin Costner

programme.title: The Perfect Storm (2000)
programme.desc: The skipper of a fishing boat and his crew ignore severe weather warnings and head for a dangerous area of the North Atlantic in search of the last lucrative catch of the season, but end up fighting for survival in the worst storm of the 20th century. programme.title: Lost in Translation (2003)
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppolas comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: A Star Is Born (2018)
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jacksons alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott

programme.title: The Brutalist (2025)
programme.desc: When a couple flee Europe in 1947, their new lives in the US are changed by a strange client. Director Brady Corbets drama, starring Adrien Brody, Felicity Jones, Guy Pearce and Joe Alwyn

programme.title: The Firm (1993)
programme.desc: Harvard law graduate Mitch is headhunted to work for a prestigious law firm, despite his wifes warnings that it is too good to be true. After two of his colleagues are murdered, Mitch is approached by the FBI and informed the company is controlled by the Mafia - leaving him in a deadly predicament. Thriller, adapted from the novel by John Grisham, starring Tom Cruise, Gene Hackman, Jeanne Tripplehorn and Holly Hunter

programme.title: The Gentleman (2025)
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman

programme.title: Bone Lake (2024)
programme.desc: A couples holiday is upended when theyre forced to share a mansion with a mysterious couple, spiralling into a maze of sex, lies and manipulation. Comedy thriller, starring Alex Roe and Maddie Hasson

programme.title: King Ivory (2024)
programme.desc: Tulsa narcotics cop Layne West is locked in a battle with the citys criminal underworld. When his son becomes addicted to fentanyl, West teams up with his partner Ty and FBI agent Beatty to bring down those responsible. Thriller, starring James Badge Dale and Ben Foster

programme.title: Plainclothes (2025)
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmis thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon (2025)
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been enemies for generations, young warrior Hiccup breaks tradition by forming an unlikely bond with Toothless, a feared Night Fury. Live action fantasy adventure, starring Mason Thames, Nico Parker and Gerard Butler

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: PC Dave Smith and his Belgian shepherd Kelly race to the scene of a burglary at a pet-food store, but when the suspects are found to have fled the scene, police helicopter India 99 is used to help track them down. PC Adele Gibson and her sidekick Diesel take part in a dawn drugs raid, and the London heats of the annual police dog trials give PC Andy Millers dog Nelson the chance to test his skills. Narrated by Ken Stott

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Documentary series which follows a rapid response team of police officers as they tackle crime

programme.desc: With the help of canines, officers down a suspect hiding in the woods and a traffic stop reveals hidden guns and drugs

programme.title: Murders That Shocked the Nation
programme.desc: Fred Dinenage offers an insight into the life of Lord Lucan, suspected of murdering his childrens nanny, Sandra Rivett, in November 1974. The peer subsequently disappeared and has never been seen since, though unsubstantiated rumours suggest he died in Africa in 2004

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: The 2020 disappearance of 17-year-old photography student Bernadette Walker, who was last seen at her grandparents home in Peterborough, Cambridgeshire - and before long, hope turned to horror as shocking evidence emerged which shattered her close-knit community

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The crimes of Angel Maturino Resendiz, known to some as the Railroad Killer, who is thought to have taken the lives of more than 23 victims before his execution in 2006

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Expert criminologists look into the mind of William Suff, who was convicted of killing 12 women in Riverside County, California, throughout the 1980s, and now sits on death row

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A profile of child killer Roy Whiting, the convicted sex offender who abducted and murdered eight-year-old Sarah Payne

programme.desc: The presenter explores the case of John Straffen, who killed two young girls in the summer of 1951. He was found to be unfit to plead and committed to Broadmoor Hospital, but during a brief escape from the facility in 1952 he killed again. It was determined that the cause of his behaviour was severe brain damage, traced back to an attack of encephalitis as a child in India. When he died in 2007, he was the longest-serving prisoner in Britain

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson travels along the north Norfolk coast through one of the least developed spots in Britain, finding out how the area maintained its rural, remote identity despite the dynamic industrial changes of the Victorian age. From the arrival of Bertie, Prince of Wales at Sandringham House to the opening of Cromer Pier, Tonys four-day walk sees him learn about key periods in the countys history. He explores prime shooting estates, purpose-built seaside resorts, salt marshes and disused railway lines as he discovers how powerful landowners were able to control development and even shape the railways to suit their needs

programme.desc: Military combat specialists Karl Ude-Martinez and Kevin Hicks investigate the British uprising against the Roman army, examining how swords, spears and body armour were developed. Plus, how battlefield wounds were treated on the frontlines

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britains most historic landscapes. The moors and valleys of West Yorkshire were the home of, and inspiration for, the Brontës, the literary family who produced such classics as Wuthering Heights and Jane Eyre. Over four days, Tony heads out from the Victorian wool capital of Bradford and treks in a giant loop around what is now known as Brontë Country. From the birth of Charlotte, Emily, Anne and their brother Branwell in the suburb of Thornton, he traces their childhoods to the much-romanticised Brontë hub of Haworth, finding that the harsh reality of life in the 1820s was far removed from the fantasy world dreamed up by the children at their fathers parsonage home

programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britains most historic landscapes. The moors and valleys of West Yorkshire were the home of, and inspiration for, the Brontës, the literary family who produced such classics as Wuthering Heights and Jane Eyre. Over four days, Tony heads out from the Victorian wool capital of Bradford and treks in a giant loop around what is now known as Brontë Country. From the birth of Charlotte, Emily, Anne and their brother Branwell in the suburb of Thornton, he traces their childhoods to the much-romanticised Brontë hub of Haworth, finding that the harsh reality of life in the 1820s was far removed from the fantasy world dreamed up by the children at their fathers parsonage home

programme.title: Instruments of Death
programme.sub-title: The Napoleonic Wars: The Battle of Waterloo 1815
programme.desc: Kevin Hicks and Karl Ude-Martinez test a cannon, grenade and Brown Bess musket as they explore what it was like to face a Napoleonic charge

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A look at some of the worlds most strange unexplained phenomena. Since the 1950s, multiple air disasters have had one thing in common - flight number 191. Is it a coincidence, or something more sinister?

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A bizarre trend happened in Ireland in the 1980s when thousands of people started seeing religious statues move. Some residents of a village reported seeing a statue of the Virgin Mary move. Others believed the phenomenon was just an optical illusion or a prank

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained

programme.desc: A fresh look at the Third Reich from a global and current perspective. This episode recalls how a social protest turned into a racist and anti-Jewish movement during the 1920s. The NSDAP deliberately used emotions to gain the loyalty of the people

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the turbulent history of the Tower of London, which is one of Britains most famous buildings and has been a military fortress, a palace, a royal mint, a prison, a zoo and a place of execution. He reveals how one kings obsession with money led to the Tower becoming the focus of the worst Jewish massacre the country had ever seen and explains how a mob of disgruntled peasants managed to break through its defences as they sought bloody revenge for taxes they could no longer put up with

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Warwick Castle, which started as a motte and bailey fort established by William the Conqueror in 1068 and was transformed into a stone fortress two centuries later by the Beauchamp family. He examines the role Guy Beauchamp played in the kidnapping and murder of one of Edward IIs closest allies and descends into the castles claustrophobic dungeon

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones heads to Gwynedd to explore the history of Caernarfon Castle, the building of which began in 1283 on the orders of Edward I. He demonstrates how the castles vast stone walls and strategically designed towers repelled all enemies, even the Welsh national hero Owain Glyndwr, earning itself a truly forbidding reputation, but its military importance faded at the end of the 15th century when Henry Tudor - a Welshman - made his way on to the English throne

programme.title: Great British Castle Rescue
programme.desc: Rick Edwards takes an aerial and up-close view of some of the UKs most awe-inspiring castles. Beginning at Fyvie Castle in Scotland, Rick meets Annie Robertson, who faces the task of saving the childhood home of Charles I from collapse

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts joins archaeologists on digs of northern Britain, revealing a Roman Emperors lost bath house, the sunken treasures of medieval pilgrims and a formidable fortress perched on top of a Scottish mountain

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick heads east to the Big Apple to see if he can compute a deal on a rare piece of tech. A seller flies into the shop with a special edition Stan Lee Funko Pop figure

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe takes a trip down memory lane as he explores the thrilling legacy of stuntman Evel Knievel. This stockpile is packed with items that hold significant historical value

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Mike finds himself juggling two responsibilities - managing the restoration of a 1969 Road Runner convertible from a distance, while also working remotely for his rock scaling business. Averys new Austin Mini project looks modest, but its budget threatens to mount

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa Kelly tackles the longest run of the season so far, but disaster strikes when a fire breaks out beneath her truck - while she hauls barrels of explosive oil, and a fire erupts beneath her truck during a perilous, long run on the ice roads, showcasing the extreme dangers of her job. Todd Dewey returns to face an old nemesis that once defeated him and destroyed his truck - Asheweig Road

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Documentary series following lorry drivers who haul vital supplies over frozen terrain in North America

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. In Buckinghamshire, Simon Mays and Jill Eyers use a recent rediscovery of artefacts from a 1912 excavation to investigate what appears to have been a mass infanticide during the Roman era. Alice also meets the team examining one of the largest discoveries of Roman coins ever made in Britain, and hears about a mystery in Dorset

programme.title: WW2 Air Crash Detectives
programme.sub-title: Lost and Confused: Sharp Top Mountain B25 Crash
programme.desc: Garth Barnard investigates how thousands of soldiers during the Second World War died in catastrophic air accidents and tragic training crashes. In the first edition, he tries to uncover what happened on board a B-25 Mitchell Bomber that crashed into Sharp Top mountain in Virginia in 1943, resulting in the deaths of five people

programme.title: WW2 Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: The documentary concludes with a look at a 1943 crash in Gibraltar, which killed General Wladyslaw Sikorski, the Prime Minister of Polands London-based government. Presenter Garth Barnard investigates many of the unanswered questions from the tragedy, including why the pilot was wearing a life jacket and why many of the bodies believed to be on the plane were never found, and asks whether the accident could have actually been an assassination

programme.title: WW2 Air Crash Detectives
programme.sub-title: Australias Worst Air Crash - Bakers Creek
programme.desc: Garth Barnard investigates the Bakers Creek aviation disaster in Australia in 1943, when 40 American servicemen were killed when their B-17 bomber aircraft crashed

programme.title: Digging for Britain

She also joins a team at Forteviot in Scotland, where the uncovering of a Bronze Age grave holds a big surprise

programme.title: Bradley Walsh: Egypts Cosmic Code
programme.desc: The presenter and one-time Rolls Royce engineer fulfils a lifetimes ambition to visit the monuments of Ancient Egypt in a bid to understand how it could have been possible to produce such wonders of the ancient world 4,500 years ago. An expert guide is on hand to lay out the mainstream thinking and act as the perfect foil for Bradley and his theories

programme.title: Bradley Walsh: Egypts Cosmic Code
programme.desc: The presenter dives deeper into Egypts mysteries, exploring the Great Sphinx and the underground Serapeum with its precision-cut granite sarcophagi, questioning their purpose and links to the pyramid enigma. Travelling south, he visits the intricately designed Dendera Temple, where hieroglyphs and imagery hint at possible extraterrestrial connections. He concludes at the sprawling Karnak temple complex, marvelling at its monumental engineering, sphinx-lined avenues, and Hatshepsuts towering obelisk - wondering whether its simply a monument or a channel for cosmic energy

programme.title: Bradley Walsh: Egypts Cosmic Code
programme.desc: The presenter sets out to uncover the mysteries of King Tutankhamun. Along the way, he encounters the enigmatic Alien King Akhenaten and his wife, Nefertiti. Sailing down the Nile, he investigates how the Ancient Egyptians transported enormous stone blocks for their architectural marvels, including the 700-ton Colossi of Memnon. His quest then leads him into the Valley of the Kings, where he discovers the resting places of Akhenaten and King Tuts successor, Horemheb - before finally coming face to face with the mummy of the Boy King himself

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the Galapagos, a collection of volcanic islands in the Pacific known for its extraordinary wildlife. More than 150 years after Charles Darwin formulated his ground-breaking theory of evolution on the remote archipelago, Attenborough explains how life on the islands has continued to evolve in biological isolation, examining how the ever-changing volcanic landscape has given birth to species and sub-species that exist nowhere else in the world. He begins by revealing how Galapagos rose from the ocean four million years ago

programme.title: Sudden Death (1995)
programme.desc: Terrorists seize control of an ice-hockey stadium in the middle of a match attended by the US vice president. Taking the politician hostage, they threaten to blow up the building at the final whistle - but a resourceful former fireman takes it upon himself to thwart their dastardly plot. Action thriller, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Powers Boothe, Raymond J Barry and Whittni Wright

programme.title: Hero (2002)
programme.desc: A warlord in ancient China sends out messengers throughout his kingdom to declare a reward for whoever can kill three assassins intent on murdering him. In response, a warrior arrives at the rulers palace and claims that he has already defeated the would-be killers, but his story does not quite ring true. Martial arts adventure, starring Jet Li, Tony Leung Chiu Wai and Maggie Cheung Man-Yuk. In Mandarin

programme.title: Vendetta (2022)
programme.desc: When his daughter is brutally murdered and legal justice looks unlikely, William Duncan takes the law into his own hands, setting out on a quest for retribution. After killing the street thug who was directly responsible for her death, he finds himself in the middle of a war with the dead mans brother, who is equally hell-bent on getting even. Action thriller, starring Bruce Willis and Thomas Jane

programme.title: Street Fighter (1994)
programme.desc: A military officer goes in search of a power-mad general who is holding several hostages in a secret location. He soon finds he is not the only one on the maniacs trail, and joins forced with a mismatched band of martial artists to save the captives. Action adventure based on the video game, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Raul Julia, Kylie Minogue and Ming-Na Wen

programme.title: The Beekeeper (2024)
programme.desc: An apparently unassuming man finds someone very important to him has been scammed and driven to harm. Revealed as a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organisation known as Beekeepers, he sets out on a brutal quest of vengeance, hunting those responsible for the incident, who have seriously underestimated how much of a threat he is. Action thriller, starring Jason Statham, Jeremy Irons, Minnie Driver and Jemma Redgrave

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage (2017)
programme.desc: The extreme sports-loving super spy is brought out of exile when a lethal gang of mercenaries steal a powerful new weapon that threatens the safety of the entire world. He must assemble his own team of adrenaline junkie agents to recover the lethal device. Action thriller, starring Vin Diesel, Donnie Yen, Toni Collette and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Rampage (2018)
programme.desc: When three different animals become infected with a dangerous pathogen, a primatologist and a geneticist team up to stop them from destroying Chicago. Fantasy adventure, starring Dwayne Johnson, Naomie Harris and Malin Akerman

programme.title: I Am Legend (2007)
programme.desc: A Manhattan-based military scientist finds himself immune to a virus that turns humans into ferocious vampire-like creatures. After the disease has swept across the world, wiping out an estimated 90 per cent of the human population, he devotes his solitary existence to finding a cure by unlocking the secret within his blood. Sci-fi thriller, starring Will Smith, Alice Braga and Charlie Tahan

programme.title: Bad Boys II (2003)
programme.desc: Two mismatched undercover cops set out to halt an underground gang war and bring down a drug lord attempting to flood the market with a deadly form of Ecstasy. However, a romantic interlude threatens to drive the investigation off course. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Will Smith, Martin Lawrence, Gabrielle Union, Jordi Molla and Peter Stormare

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw (2019)
programme.desc: Hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless mercenary Deckard Shaw have spent years trying to take each other down. But the mismatched heroes must put their differences aside and team up when a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist gains control of an insidious bio-threat that could alter humanity forever. Action adventure spin-off, starring Dwayne Johnson, Jason Statham, Idris Elba and Helen Mirren

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning (2025)
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt is in exile with both halves of the 3D cruciform key that can unlock the source code of rogue AI creation, the Entity. Hunt returns to London to reunite with Luther Stickell, Benji Dunn and former thief Grace. The Entitys human henchman, Gabriel, is still on the loose, so Hunt bolsters his ranks with vengeful French assassin Paris and US intelligence agent Theo Degas. Action thriller, starring Tom Cruise, Hayley Atwell, Ving Rhames, Simon Pegg and Esai Morales

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3 (1992)
programme.desc: As Murtagh counts down his last few days on the force before retirement, he and Riggs go on the trail of a former LAPD officer who is using his insider knowledge to steal confiscated weaponry and ammunition, then selling it on to criminal gang bosses. The duo are assigned to work with internal affairs investigator Lorna Cole, while they also get help from old friend - and reformed small-time crook - Leo Getz. Action thriller sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci and Rene Russo

programme.title: Enter the Dragon (1973)
programme.desc: A powerful crime kingpin hosts a martial arts tournament on his island lair. A former Shaolin monk is recruited by an intelligence agency to enter the tournament and expose the crime lords opium and slavery rings. He finds himself fighting for his life alongside two Vietnam veterans who are both fleeing their own enemies. Thriller, starring Bruce Lee, John Saxon, Jim Kelly and Kien Shih

programme.title: The Running Man (1987)
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot is framed for the murder of starving civilians - and ends up being forced to take part in a brutal TV game show in which a succession of gadget-wielding killers hunt him on the streets of Los Angeles. Sci-fi action adventure inspired by a Stephen King story, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Yaphet Kotto, Maria Conchita Alonso and Richard Dawson

Leonidas, fearless king of Sparta, leads 300 of his finest warriors into battle against the vast invading armies of the ruler of the Persian empire. As the outnumbered Spartans fight for their country, his queen, Gorgo, tries to rally support for her husband at home. Fantasy action adventure based on Frank Miller and Lynn Varleys comic-book series, starring Gerard Butler, Lena Headey, Dominic West, David Wenham and Rodrigo Santoro

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: A former Marine sniper is coaxed back into action when government officials need his help to prevent an assassination attempt on the US president. However, the intended target is in fact an African archbishop, and the marksman is set up by double-crossing agents to take the fall, forcing him to go on the run as he fights to clear his name. Action thriller, with Mark Wahlberg, Michael Pena and Danny Glover

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3 (1992)
programme.desc: As Murtagh counts down his last few days on the force before retirement, he and Riggs go on the trail of a former LAPD officer who is using his insider knowledge to steal confiscated weaponry and ammunition, then selling it on to criminal gang bosses. The duo are assigned to work with internal affairs investigator Lorna Cole, while they also get help from old friend - and reformed small-time crook - Leo Getz. Action thriller sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci and Rene Russo

As the outnumbered Spartans fight for their country, his queen, Gorgo, tries to rally support for her husband at home. Fantasy action adventure based on Frank Miller and Lynn Varleys comic-book series, starring Gerard Butler, Lena Headey, Dominic West, David Wenham and Rodrigo Santoro

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning (2025)
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt is in exile with both halves of the 3D cruciform key that can unlock the source code of rogue AI creation, the Entity. Hunt returns to London to reunite with Luther Stickell, Benji Dunn and former thief Grace. The Entitys human henchman, Gabriel, is still on the loose, so Hunt bolsters his ranks with vengeful French assassin Paris and US intelligence agent Theo Degas. Action thriller, starring Tom Cruise, Hayley Atwell, Ving Rhames, Simon Pegg and Esai Morales

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum (2007)
programme.desc: Amnesiac rogue assassin Jason Bournes long-buried memories are reawakened by a British journalist researching the secret organisation that was responsible for transforming him into a killing machine. Meanwhile, a ruthless CIA director becomes convinced Bourne is still a security risk, and plans to dispose of him once and for all. Third instalment of the spy thriller series, directed by Paul Greengrass and starring Matt Damon, Joan Allen, Julia Stiles, David Strathairn, Paddy Considine, Scott Glenn and Albert Finney

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: The Running Man (1987)
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot is framed for the murder of starving civilians - and ends up being forced to take part in a brutal TV game show in which a succession of gadget-wielding killers hunt him on the streets of Los Angeles. Sci-fi action adventure inspired by a Stephen King story, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Yaphet Kotto, Maria Conchita Alonso and Richard Dawson

programme.title: Pitch Black (2000)
programme.desc: A spaceship crashes on a desolate alien planet inhabited by nocturnal predators. The creatures fear of light seems to guarantee the survivors safety - but when an eclipse takes place, they face a desperate struggle to survive. Their only hope lies with a convicted murderer, who is equally at home in the darkness - but is far from trustworthy. Sci-fi horror, starring Vin Diesel and Radha Mitchell

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: A former Marine sniper is coaxed back into action when government officials need his help to prevent an assassination attempt on the US president. However, the intended target is in fact an African archbishop, and the marksman is set up by double-crossing agents to take the fall, forcing him to go on the run as he fights to clear his name. Action thriller, with Mark Wahlberg, Michael Pena and Danny Glover

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: The councillors turn against each other as the vision of Lilith sows seeds of discord among the Authority, and Bill slips further into religious fanaticism when the ancient creature describes him as the chosen one. Meanwhile, Russells quest to walk in the daylight takes him to the fairy burlesque club, where only Jason and a shotgun stand between the former vampire king and the Elder. Supernatural drama, starring Stephen Moyer

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: The tensions between humanity and the fanatical Sanguinista faction reach a head, prompting Eric to embark on a desperate mission to overthrow the corrupted Authority and save Bill from giving in to the monster within. Meanwhile, Andy faces the consequences of his light pact, and Alcide prepares for a showdown with JD. Supernatural drama, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Anna Paquin and Stephen Moyer

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: A school detention class is thrown into chaos when a teacher is killed and the pupils run riot - unaware that a deadly therocephalian is stalking the corridors looking for its next meal. ARCs attempts to capture the creature are hampered when youngsters hack into the automatic locking system, but the school lab proves invaluable when an even greater threat emerges. Elsewhere, Abbys menagerie is under threat. Hannah Spearritt and Andrew-Lee Potts star

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Connor and Abby are sent to investigate unusual anomaly signals in a coastal village, where they uncover the existence of a supposedly mythical labyrinthodont that has turned its attentions to the local fishermen after attacking cows. Back at ARC, Lester and Jess learn that Emily has been kidnapped by Ethan, prompting Matt to make a dash to a cemetery - where he faces a difficult choice. Hannah Spearritt and Andrew-Lee Potts star

programme.title: Wynonna Earp
programme.desc: Murder, mayhem and cannibalism ensue when the town plays host to a quiz night. Fantasy drama, starring Melanie Scrofano

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and Derek Acorah visit West Wycombe caves, the site of the notorious Hell Fire Clubs satanic rituals, hoping something will go bump during their night-time vigil

programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and spirit medium Derek Acorah travel to the Black Swan Hotel in Devizes, where they are helped by Uri Geller as they uncover a shocking secret

programme.sub-title: Wrongs Darker Than Death or Night

Meanwhile, Beckers life becomes endangered as the hunt for Ethan continues. Hannah Spearritt, Andrew-Lee Potts and Lucy Brown star

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Disillusioned by the inflexibility of Starfleets regime, Tom Paris plans to leave Voyager and join a Talaxian convoy. When Neelix finds out he decides to draw on his new-found journalistic skills to pursue the case

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: High-ranking investigating officers infiltrate the station and force Sisko to allow them free rein. Unfortunately, the questioning soon takes a sinister turn as Bashir finds his motivation for taking part in dangerous missions being called into question. Starring Avery Brooks and Alexander Siddig

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Lester hears reports that a man has been dragged into a huge hole in the ground, so the team heads out to investigate and soon comes face to face with a giant burrowing insect causing chaos across the city. Matt devises a plan to draw the creature out so it can be killed, but more than one member of the gang is put in danger as the battle commences. Back at ARC, Philip hires a new lab assistant for Connor, but is there more to her than meets the eye? Sci-fi adventure, starring Ben Miller, Ciaran McMenamin, Andrew-Lee Potts, Hannah Spearritt and Alexander Siddig

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: When a nuclear submarine encounters an anomaly in the sea, the team is called aboard to help, only to come under attack from aquatic reptiles and be transported back to prehistoric times. With external damage to the sub and no electricity, Connor, Matt and Abby face a struggle to repair the craft for the journey home while fending off the marauding creatures. Back at ARC, Lester has to cope with Navy bigwigs threatening drastic action if the crew cannot fix the problem. Sci-fi adventure, starring Andrew-Lee Potts, Hannah Spearritt, Ciaran McMenamin and Ben Miller

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel Jackson is reunited with his long-lost wife Share, but owing to unfortunate circumstances they find themselves on opposing sides, and painful sacrifices have to be made. Sci-fi drama, starring Michael Shanks

With external damage to the sub and no electricity, Connor, Matt and Abby face a struggle to repair the craft for the journey home while fending off the marauding creatures. Back at ARC, Lester has to cope with Navy bigwigs threatening drastic action if the crew cannot fix the problem. Sci-fi adventure, starring Andrew-Lee Potts, Hannah Spearritt, Ciaran McMenamin and Ben Miller

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard worries his lack of American football knowledge is alienating him from Penny and her friends. However, he finds an unlikely sporting tutor in the form of Sheldon, who reluctantly spent most of his childhood attending games with his father. Meanwhile, Raj is infuriated when Howard abandons him to pursue a girl at a kite-fighting contest

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A jealous Leonard argues with Penny when she invites one of her male friends to stay at her apartment while he is in town. Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howards fear of commitment causes him to avoid Bernadette, but he soon realises he has made a mistake and tries to compensate for it. Meanwhile, Kripke plays a prank during a radio interview with Sheldon, who sets out to get revenge, only to be caught by the Dean. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with an appearance by Katee Sackhoff (Battlestar Galactica) as herself

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette asks Leonard about his physics experiment, making Howard so jealous that she threatens to end their relationship. Penny also feels put out by the situation, and asks Sheldon to teach her about science. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonards mother visits and he is horrified to learn that Sheldon knows more than he does about his own family, including his parents impending divorce and the death of his dog. Guest starring Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj lusts after a girl he and Sheldon meet at a university party, and Leonard comes to regret airing his disapproval of Pennys belief in psychics. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldons flat is burgled, so they work on a state-of-the-art security system in a bid to outwit any future would-be thieves. However, their plans go awry when they ensnare Penny in a net. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon misses an opportunity to meet Spider-Man co-creator Stan Lee when he has to go to court for driving through a red light, and his anger leads to his imprisonment. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows hell have to give a speech. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: An uprising occurs in 1920s Libya against Italian fascist colonial rule. Mussolini personally assigns a sadistic general to use whatever means it takes to crush the revolt, leading to a bitter personal conflict between the colonisers and a rebel leader. Fact-based drama, starring Anthony Quinn, Oliver Reed, Rod Steiger and Irene Papas

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: The chef travels across the country to discover the secrets of planting, rearing livestock and growing vegetables to help him transform his smallholding. He begins by bringing in new livestock and his first addition are pigs, but he needs to choose animals that will provide him with the best possible meat

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: Archaeologists Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn team up with historian Ruth Goodman as they move to Morwellham Quay in Devon and try to take the port - once one of Britains busiest - back to life as it was during its Edwardian heyday. They begin by setting up home in a cottage as they wait for the arrival of their first livestock, and set out to prepare the ground for cropping by making tons of quicklime fertiliser to neutralise the acidity of the soil

programme.title: Edwardian Farm

programme.title: The Greatest Auction

programme.title: My Greek Kitchen

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden

As he takes on the day-to-day challenges of farming life gardener Anatoli shows him how to plait his garlic before Marcus heads to a local artisan to get some of it smoked

programme.title: Garden Rescue

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: Buyers bid for a guitar amp used by Jimi Hendrix and a bizarre collection of celebrity hair. An ornate chair with pagan carvings sparks a bidding war and a vintage travel trunk from the 1930s goes under the hammer

programme.title: Love Your Home and Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and a team of architects, builders and gardeners transform the kitchen and garden of wheelchair-bound 15-year-old Josh, who has multiple disabilities. The kitchen is so tiny that Josh and his mum Benita cannot be in it together, and Joshs wheelchair wont fit through the back door so the garden is completely off-limits. Architects Ewald and George create a new layout in the house so Josh can move from the front door to the back garden with ease, and task builder Kunle turns the kitchen into a state-of-the-art conservatory so mother and son can cook together for the first time. In the garden, Alan creates a series of different rooms, each designed to appeal to different senses

programme.title: Come Play With Me (1977)
programme.desc: A nurse at a health farm takes over running the establishment, and comes up with her own range of sexual treatments. Meanwhile, two forgers on the run hide out at the farm. Sex comedy, starring Mary Millington, Alfie Bass and Irene Handl

programme.title: Lion of the Desert (1980)
programme.desc: An uprising occurs in 1920s Libya against Italian fascist colonial rule. Mussolini personally assigns a sadistic general to use whatever means it takes to crush the revolt, leading to a bitter personal conflict between the colonisers and a rebel leader. Fact-based drama, starring Anthony Quinn, Oliver Reed, Rod Steiger and Irene Papas

programme.title: Musketeer
programme.desc: An old musketeer meets a youth and two scoundrels on the road to Paris. Short drama, starring Kevin McNally, Andrew Lewis and Charlie Allen

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: Marcus heads to one of his old stomping grounds, Gravetye Manor, to explore their grand kitchen garden before returning to his smallholding to help a local farmer with hay bailing. As he takes on the day-to-day challenges of farming life gardener Anatoli shows him how to plait his garlic before Marcus heads to a local artisan to get some of it smoked

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: It is October and Alex Langlands, Peter Ginn and Ruth Goodman take on new enterprises - market gardening, egg production, raising beef cattle and food preservation - using only Edwardian tools and materials. The team members also create cider on an industrial scale, bring a bull to the farm, launch a chicken business and celebrate Halloween - early 20th-century style

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Auctioneer Catherine Southon, dealer Tony Wong and upholsterer Micaela Sharp scour the antique shops, scrapyards and flea markets of Faversham in search of items to turn a profit

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping programming bringing you a selection of innovative products

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping programming bringing you a selection of innovative products

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Lee Burkhill are in Fareham, Hampshire, to transform Lisa and Mikes unloved plot into a practical, productive garden that the whole family can enjoy. The couple would love the space to remind them of the pocket gardens they saw when on holiday in Finland, as well as the lush tropical jungle they experienced on their honeymoon in Borneo. They have a budget of £3,500 to realise their dreams

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: Marcus heads to one of his old stomping grounds, Gravetye Manor, to explore their grand kitchen garden before returning to his smallholding to help a local farmer with hay bailing. As he takes on the day-to-day challenges of farming life gardener Anatoli shows him how to plait his garlic before Marcus heads to a local artisan to get some of it smoked

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn plough the land to plant potatoes and oats in an effort to secure some income, and are introduced to one of the Edwardian ages prime agricultural innovations - the tractor. Elsewhere, Ruth Goodman prepares for the arrival of the pigs by restoring an ingenious compost-maker, Peter starts to build a trout farm, and Alex learns to forge a billhook to maintain the hedgerows

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as buyers bid for a piece of a Formula 1 car driven by Ayrton Senna, a gold and platinum-plated Toyota Supra engine and a poster and ticket from a Sex Pistols tour that never happened. An ornate brass palm-tree light from the 1970s also goes up for sale

programme.title: My Greek Kitchen
programme.desc: Tonia Buxton visits Naxos and picks vine leaves, a staple ingredient of Greek dish dolmades

programme.title: My Greek Kitchen
programme.desc: Tonia Buxton visits a farm in Santorini, finding ingredients to make delicious tomato fritters. She also creates a traditional Greek moussaka

programme.title: Supermarket Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Consumer show lifting the lid on secrets the major food retailers would rather keep to themselves

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn plough the land to plant potatoes and oats in an effort to secure some income, and are introduced to one of the Edwardian ages prime agricultural innovations - the tractor. Elsewhere, Ruth Goodman prepares for the arrival of the pigs by restoring an ingenious compost-maker, Peter starts to build a trout farm, and Alex learns to forge a billhook to maintain the hedgerows

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: Setting out to bring in new livestock and expand the range of produce, Marcus Wareing introduces chickens and wild mushrooms to his Sussex small holding. With a feast in mind to celebrate, he checks out the local vineyard and gets a lesson on English wines and a free tasting of what the neighbours are producing

programme.title: Love Your Home and Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and his team of experts meet Anne and Mike, who have been married for 54 years and for almost a decade have been dealing with Mikes dementia. As his condition has worsened, their house - with its peculiar layout of rooms - has become increasingly difficult to cope with. An even bigger challenge is the garden, which is more than a metre below the house and therefore off-limits to Mike

programme.title: Permissive (1970)
programme.desc: A woman comes to London to visit an old friend, and gets drawn into the world of rock band groupies. She quickly sinks into a self-destructive hedonistic lifestyle, and is consumed with jealousy as she and rival groupies bitterly compete to outshine each other in the eyes of the musicians they cling to. Drama, starring Maggie Stride and Gay Singleton

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All (1970)
programme.desc: Two American mercenaries are hired by a Turkish governor as the country is gripped by revolution in the 1920s. The soldiers of fortune are charged to protect their employers three daughters and a shipment of gold, which they decide to steal. However, a corrupt colonel also plots to take the loot for himself. Action comedy, starring Tony Curtis, Charles Bronson and Patrick Magee

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A popular reggae band reunite after 30 years to perform on Saint Marie, but the joyous occasion is blighted when guitarist Billy Springer is found dead in his dressing room afterwards. With a gun in his hand and the door locked from the inside, all evidence points toward suicide - but when the Commissioner reveals he received a message from the victim earlier in the day, the case becomes rather more complicated. Meanwhile, Dwayne struggles to come to terms with his dads surprise visit. Is it too late for them to make amends? With guest appearances by Ram John Holder, Suzanne Packer, Delroy Brown and Levi Roots

programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: Lucy Lawless stars as Alexa Crowe, a former cop-turned-private investigator called upon to provide professional support and advice to ex-colleague and long-time friend Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey. In the opening instalment, she is lured into the world of murder and mystery when asked to look into the death of a woman who fell from the balcony of a male escort. Thriller, co-starring Bernard Curry

programme.sub-title: In the Footsteps of a Killer

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Old mates Jay, Gerald, Adam and David arrive on Saint Marie ready for the holiday of a lifetime at the Crystal Bay Horse Ranch. The occasion soon turns sour when the island is shaken by a torrential storm, and ranch owner Hannah advises the men to wait it out in their tents. By morning, Jack thinks he has seen the worst of it, until he opens up the locked police station and finds the body of a man lying in the middle of the floor. Its Adam, with scratches on his arms and laceration marks around his neck
